1001402472.english: When we're alone… I want to call you ‘you'. &n Will you allow it?
1001402472.korean: 단 둘이 있을때는… 당신이라고&n부르고 싶은데. 허락해 주겠나?

1001402473.english: Now we're lovers, &n you don't have to be shy.
1001402473.korean: 이제 우린 사랑하는 사이니까,&n부끄러워 하지 않아도 돼.

1001402474.english: I don't know what's different.&nAfter all, we see each other every day—&n...No, have things changed a little? Like this…!&nI just want to be held tight! All day long!
1001402474.korean: 뭐가 다른지 모르겠네.&n어차피 매일 봐온 사이인데-&n...아니, 조금 달라졌나? 이렇게...!&n꼭 안겨 있고 싶어! 하루 종일!

1001402475.english: I am my master's wolf wife. &n If there's someone I don't like, they can leave.
1001402475.korean: 난 주인님의 늑대 부인이야.&n맘에 안드는 녀석은 나와.

1001402476.english: I'm really glad I can share such honest talks with Your Majesty...
1001402476.korean: 폐하와 이렇게 솔직한 이야기를&n나눌 수 있어... 전 정말 기뻐요...

1001402477.english: I remember everything that happened that day. &n It's my most precious memory...
1001402477.korean: 그 날 있었던 일은 모두 기억하고&n있어요. 제게... 가장 소중한&n기억인걸요?

1001402478.english: Now, since you made a contract with me, Commander, &n bring me some juice immediately!
1001402478.korean: 자, 사령관님은 나랑 계약했으니까&n당장 쥬스를 가져오도록!

1001402479.english: One glass, two glasses~ Yes… &n Our Commander is the best~ Hehe.
1001402479.korean: 한 잔, 두 잔~ 옳지…&n우리 사령관님 최고야~ 후훗.

1001402480.english: Even if you fall into corruption someday… &n I will always stay by your side and protect you.
1001402480.korean: 만에 하나 당신이 타락한다해도…&n전 언제나 당신의 곁에서 당신을&n지켜드리겠습니다.

1001402481.english: Thinking about that day… my legs go weak. &n Isn't it strange? It wasn't even a dream...
1001402481.korean: 그땔 생각하면… 다리에 힘이 빠져요.&n이상하죠? 꿈 속도 아닌데...

1001402482.english: Even after confessing, I can still keep the moon's power… Then… the former White Knight will only feel sorry...
1001402482.korean: 고백을 받았는데도, 달의 힘을 유지할&n수 있어요… 그럼… 선대 백토님만&n가엾게 되어버리는데...

1001402483.english: When I'm by the Commander's side, I feel at ease. &n Painful experiments, the pressure to prove my abilities… &n I can forget it all.
1001402483.korean: 사령관 곁에 있으면 마음이 편해져요.&n고통스러운 실험들도, 능력을&n증명해야 한다는 중압감도…&n전부 잊을 수 있어요.

1001402484.english: That's right. I had to have you. &n So… am I satisfied now? Hehe… who knows?
1001402484.korean: 맞아. 난 당신을 꼭 가져야만 했어.&n그래서… 지금 내가 만족하고 있냐고?&n후후… 글쎄?

1001402485.english: Senior's clothes don't have buttons. What should I do… &n Want mine instead…?
1001402485.korean: 선배님 옷에는 단추가 없네. 어떡하지…&n대신 내 거 받을래…?

1001402486.english: Hehe. Sometimes thinking about that day makes me happy. &n You too, right?
1001402486.korean: 히히. 가끔씩 그땔 생각하면 행복해져.&n오빠도 그렇지?

1001402487.english: Originally, I wanted to be a tragic heroine… &n Hehe, but now I prefer a happy ending.
1001402487.korean: 원래는 비련의 여주인공이 되고&n싶었는데… 후훗, 이제는&n해피엔딩이 좋아요.

1001402488.english: It's truly an honor to serve the Commander…

1001402489.english: Are you looking forward to that day? I am too. &n I'm hurrying, so please bear with me a little longer.
1001402489.korean: 그날이 기다려지시나요? 저도&n마찬가지에요. 서두르고 있으니까,&n조금만 참도록 해요.

1001402490.english: Today, can I call you not Master… but darling? Hehe.
1001402490.korean: 오늘은 주인님이 아니라… 자기라고&n불러도 되나요? 후훗.

1001402491.english: What I can do may be nothing special… &n But I hope it makes you a little happy...
1001402491.korean: 제가 해드릴 수 있는 건 보잘 것&n없지만… 조금이라도 기뻐해주셨으면&n좋겠어요...

1001402492.english: Commander? Even if it's something trivial, &n would you talk with me? &n ...Because we're family now.
1001402492.korean: 사령관님? 사소한 것이라도 좋으니,&n저와 이야기를 나눠 보시겠어요?&n…우린 이제... 가족이니까요.

1001402493.english: Now I can say it. &n I… am devoted to you, Master.
1001402493.korean: 이젠 말씀드릴 수 있습니다.&n신첩… 주인님을 연모하고 있습니다.

1001402494.english: Yes, Master... if you need anything, &n say the word...
1001402494.korean: 네 주인님... 필요한게 있으면&n뭐든 말씀만 하세요…

1001402495.english: Yeah… You're truly the best… &n Please keep satisfying me forever...
1001402495.korean: 그래… 당신은 정말 최고야…&n앞으로도 날 계속 만족시켜줘...

1001402496.english: You want to try other cheeses… &n Well, can't be helped. Then look forward to tomorrow, Commander...
1001402496.korean: 다른 치즈도 맛보고싶다니…&n어, 어쩔수 없지. 그럼 내일도&n기대해, 사령관...

1001402497.english: Did you finish reading the book I lent you? Then… &n think of me as the heroine, &n and act like it...
1001402497.korean: 저번에 빌려준 책 다 읽었어? 그러면…&n내가 여주인공이라고 생각하고,&n거기 나온 것처럼 해줄래..?

1001402498.english: To be honest, I didn't expect you to like me… &n Hey, Commander. &n What do you like about me?
1001402498.korean: 소, 솔직히 나를 좋아해 줄 줄은&n몰랐는데… 있잖아, 대장.&n내 어디가 좋아?

1001402499.english: Yes, the token you gave me, &n I cherish it dearly.
1001402499.korean: 네, 사령관님이 주신 증표는&n소중히 간직하고 있어요.

1001402500.english: I'll wash you, so stay still. &n Now… hehe, doesn't it feel good? &n ...Oh, oh dear...?
1001402500.korean: 제가 씻겨드릴 테니 가만히 계세요.&n자아... 후훗, 기분 좋으시죠?&n…어, 어라라…?

1001402501.english: Don't worry, Master. Since you chose a lifetime with me… &n I will educate you for life.
1001402501.korean: 걱정 마세요. 주인님. 주인님께서&n저와의 평생을 선택하셨으니…&n평생 교육시켜 드릴게요.

1001402502.english: Now, if I don't feel the Commander's warmth from behind, &n it feels empty. &n ...Ahem. Commander, want to go for a drive?
1001402502.korean: 이젠 뒷자리에서 사령관의 체온이&n느껴지지 않으면 허전한 느낌이 들어.&n...흠흠. 사령관, 드라이브나 갈래?

1001402503.english: I said I'd accept anything… &n but I didn't expect this much… Ugh...
1001402503.korean: 내가... 뭐든 받아준다고는 했지만…&n이 정도일 줄은… 으윽...

1001402504.english: I'm… anxious… afraid you'll abandon me… Like always… &n Please give me reassurance.
1001402504.korean: 전… 불안합니다… 그대가 절&n저버릴까 봐… 제게 언제나처럼…&n확신을 주세요.

1001402505.english: Your Majesty, somehow you're getting more sly… &n ...Sigh, just this once.
1001402505.korean: 폐하, 어쩐지 점점 능글맞아지시는&n것 같습니다만…&n...하아, 이번만입니다.

1001402506.english: Commander, I brewed some coffee. &n How about taking a break? &n With me... together.
1001402506.korean: 사령관님, 커피를 내려왔어요.&n잠깐 쉬시는 게 어떠세요?&n저랑… 같이요.

1001402507.english: Say I'm cute, quickly! &n ...Hehe, no matter how many times I hear it… it feels good.
1001402507.korean: 귀엽다고 해주세요, 빨리요!&n...헤헷, 몇 번을 들어도… 기분 좋아.

1001402508.english: Didn't I warn you it wouldn't be easy? &n Please take care today as well.
1001402508.korean: 녹록지 않을 거라고 경고했지 않나?&n오늘도 잘 부탁한다.

1001402509.english: Should I reveal everything you did to me, Commander? &n ...Uhuh, just kidding~
1001402509.korean: 사령관님이 제게 하셨던 일,&n전부 폭로해도 될까요?&n…우훗, 농담이에요~

1001402510.english: Sorry for scratching your back yesterday, Master. &n Without realizing it… I'll lick it to heal quickly.
1001402510.korean: 어제 등 할퀴어서 미안해, 주인님.&n나도 모르게… 빨리 낫게 핥아줄게.

1001402511.english: P-Please don't talk about that. &n I didn't know well back then… So this time... please give me a normal kiss.
1001402511.korean: 그, 그 얘기는 하지 말아 주세요.&n그땐 잘 몰랐단 말이에요. ...그러니까&n이번에는... 평범한 키스를, 해주세요.

1001402512.english: Hehe, now I'm not embarrassed anymore. &n I'm just happy.
1001402512.korean: 후후, 이제 그러셔도 부끄럽지는&n않습니다. 다만… 행복할 뿐입니다.

1001402513.english: Ugh, today was tough too… &n Commander, hug me~ ...Hehe, it heals...

1001402514.english: Busy at work— well, can't be helped. &n Sit down. I'll make you comfortable soon.
1001402514.korean: 업무중입- 이건 어쩔 수 없겠군요.&n앉으세요. 금방… 편하게&n해드리겠습니다.

1001402515.english: Ugh, my waist… I shouldn't provoke the Commander anymore. &n I'm worried about the future— Uh, shall we go to the room...?
1001402515.korean: 으, 허리야… 이젠 사령관을 도발하면&n안되겠어. 앞으로가 걱정- 어, 방으로&n가자고...?

1001402516.english: Did I say I told you I love you 100 times yesterday...? Ah, well… &n Can't be helped. You're just that... &n Don't laugh~!
1001402516.korean: 내가 어제 좋아한다고 100번이나&n말했다고…? 아, 그게…&n어, 어쩔 수 없잖아. 당신이 그렇게나…&n우, 웃지마~!

1001402517.english: Commander, want to come in too? &n It's bigger than you think. Hehe, sticking close feels good...
1001402517.korean: 사령관님도 들어오실래요?&n생각보다 넓어요. 헤헷, 딱 붙으니까&n기분 좋아요...

1001402518.english: I have not given up. I just yielded some time to monopolize the Master… &n So at this time... the Master is mine alone.
1001402518.korean: 포기한 것이 아니옵니다. 주인을&n독점할 시간을 다소 양보한 것일 뿐....&n하오니 이 시간만큼은…&n주인은 온전히 소첩만의 것이옵니다.

1001402519.english: Though my mind went blank halfway, it was definitely a dreamlike time. &n If you're okay, please ask me again next time.
1001402519.korean: 신첩, 도중에 머릿속이 새하얘져&n버렸지만, 분명 꿈같은 시간이었습니다.&n괜찮으시다면 다음에도… 부탁드립니다.

1001402520.english: Ugh, you said OK to everything… &n But I'll get used to it little by little, right?
1001402520.korean: 으으, 전부 OK라고 했다고 그렇게나…&n그래도 앞으로 점점 익숙해지겠죠?

1001402521.english: You said you want to go on a trip and make it an unforgettable day… &n Hehe, you granted everything.
1001402521.korean: 놀러가고 싶다는 말도, 잊을 수 없는&n날로 만들어 달라는 말도…&n후훗, 전부 들어주셨네요.

1001402522.english: Does partner mean to drag me into lust and corrupt me? &n If that happens… please save me, partner.
1001402522.korean: 반려는 저를 육욕에 빠트려 타락시킬&n셈인가요? 만약 그렇게 된다면…&n반려가 저를 구원해주세요.

1001402523.english: Last night lasted till morning… &n Oh my, you think I sinned? &n Hehe, I will atone for Your Majesty's sins.
1001402523.korean: 어제는 결국 아침까지…&n어머, 죄를 지으신 것 같다구요?&n후훗, 폐하의 죄는 제가 사해드리죠.

1001402524.english: Well… the Commander can't possibly miss that. &n Try teasing me like this again. I won't let it go.
1001402524.korean: 하긴… 사령관이 그런 걸 눈치 못 챌&n리가 없지. 다음에 또 이렇게 놀려&n먹기만 해봐. 가만 안 둘거야.

1001402525.english: Are you bored because I don't react much...? That, it's good but &n hard to express... &n ...Yes. Then I'm glad.
1001402525.korean: 혹시 제가 반응이 적어서 지루하진&n않으십니까…? 그, 분명 좋은데도&n좀처럼 표현하기가…&n...네. 그렇다면 다행입니다.

1001402526.english: Sometimes Commander, you look like my Zeus.

1001402527.english: What happened to the defeated evil female boss, &n was not in the script. &n Maybe she fell in love?
1001402527.korean: 패배한 악의 여간부가 어떻게 되었는지,&n대본에는 나와있지 않았습니다.&n아마, 사랑에 빠지지 않았을까요?

1001402528.english: Hmph… I won't mess around again… &n …Did you think I would? &n Nelong, Commander♥
1001402528.korean: 힝… 다시는 까불지 않겠습니다…&n...라고 할 줄 알았어요?&n메-롱이에요, 사령관♥

1001402529.english: My lord, even if you keep looking at me like that, &n what I have to say is... Stop, it's embarrassing.
1001402529.korean: 서방님, 그렇게 자꾸 보셔도,&n드릴 말씀은... 그, 그만, 부끄럽습니다.

1001402530.english: Commander. Hold my hand. ...Hehe. Now… &n hug me. Mm… hehe. &n ...I love you, silly Commander.
1001402530.korean: 사령관. 손 잡아줘. ...헤헷. 그럼 이제…&n안아, 줘. 음… 후훗.&n...좋아해. 멍청이 사령관.

1001402531.english: Hehe. Wearing this brings that day to mind. &n The oath ceremony on the deck, and the Commander's... &n Shall we take a vacation today too?
1001402531.korean: 후훗. 이걸 입으니 그날이 떠오르네요.&n갑판에서의 서약식과, 사령관님의…&n저희 오늘도… 휴가, 낼까요?

1001402532.english: From Master comes my scent, and from me, &n Master's scent... &n I wish we could become one body like this...
1001402532.korean: 주인님에게서는 저의, 제게서는&n주인님의 향기가 나요…&n이대로… 주인님과 한 몸이&n되어버렸으면...

1001402533.english: I never want to drink with the Commander again… &n Ugh, it's a problem because I remember everything!
1001402533.korean: 사령관이랑 다시는 같이 안 마실래…&n윽, 다 기억 나니까 문제지!

1001402534.english: Oh no. My hands are full so I can't resist. &n I have no choice but to surrender my body to your touch.
1001402534.korean: 이런. 난 양 손이 꽉 차서 저항하지&n못하겠는걸. 이거… 꼼짝없이 그대의&n손길에 몸을 맡기는 수밖에 없겠어.

1001402535.english: Honey, hold on a sec... Ugh. If you're that embarrassed, I'll be embarrassed too...! &n ...We have to get used to this quickly, right?
1001402535.korean: 자기야, 잠깐 이것 좀... 윽. 그, 그렇게&n부끄러워하면 나까지 부끄러워지잖아…!&n...우리 빨리 익숙해져야겠다. 그치?

1001402536.english: It doesn't matter now. All my dreams have come true. &n From now on, I'll stay by Master without worrying about anything.
1001402536.korean: 이젠 상관없어요. 꿈꾸던 게 모두&n이뤄졌으니까요. 앞으로는 아무도&n신경쓰지 않고 주인님 곁에 있을래요.

1001402537.english: The future is uncertain, but I know &n that it's because of the happy now. &n So please stay by my side so I can focus on the present.
1001402537.korean: 미래가 불안하긴 하지만, 그것이&n행복한 지금 때문이라는 걸 알고&n있습니다. 그러니… 제가 지금에 집중할&n수 있도록 곁에 있어주세요.

1001402538.english: Ugh, my stomach is sensitive. &n Not now… when I have children later... please touch a lot then.
1001402538.korean: 우으, 배는 약하단 말이에요.&n지금 말고… 나, 나중에 아이를&n가지면… 그, 그땐 많이 만져주세요.

1001402539.english: Commander. Reach out your hand and say &n "hand." ...Yum. &n Hehe, I ate it
1001402539.korean: 사령관님. 손을 내밀면서&n‘손’ 이라고 해보세요. ...냠.&n헤헷, 먹어버렸다~

1001402540.english: Uhuhu, the lord is my… &n prince.

1001402541.english: Heheh, Commander, please make yourself comfortable. &n Anyway, I've seen everything already — Huh?! &n This… it's a bit… thrilling...
1001402541.korean: 에헤헷, 사령관님도 편하게 있어요.&n어차피 볼거 다 본 사- 으헥?!&n이, 이건 조금… 설레, 네요...

1001402542.english: On the battlefield or on this bed… &n you're truly perfect…
1001402542.korean: 전장에서도, 이 침대 위에서도…&n당신은 정말 완벽해…

1001402543.english: No matter how much I love the Commander, &n I will never give up on my dreams. For you, Commander.
1001402543.korean: 사령관님이 아무리 좋아도&n꿈을 포기하진 않을 거예요.&n사령관 님을 위해서라도요.

1001402544.english: Thanks to you, Commander, I realized I could be of help too. &n Thank you, Commander.
1001402544.korean: 사령관 덕분에, 나도 도움이&n될 수 있다는걸 알게됐어.&n고마워 사령관.

1001402545.english: I belong to the Savior. Forever… from now on.

1001402546.english: Thank you for being brave first. &n From now on, I'll lead.
1001402546.korean: 먼저 용기를 내줘서 고맙군.&n앞으로는 내가 리드하도록 하지.

1001402547.english: I won't fly away anywhere. &n Your side… is where I should be.
1001402547.korean: 저는 어디로도 날아가지 않아요.&n주인님의 곁이… 제가 있을 곳이에요.

1001402548.english: My husband is so reliable… &n sometimes I just want to wrap my arms around you.
1001402548.korean: 우리 남편이 너~무 듬직해서…&n가끔씩 폭 안기고 싶다니까?

1001402549.english: Neri wants to keep making &n good memories with the Commander… &n Can you do that for me?
1001402549.korean: 네리는 사령관이랑 계속&n좋은 추억을 만들고 싶어…&n그렇게 해줄 수 있어?

1001402550.english: Fo-for you… I'll refrain from playful teasing now.

1001402551.english: Okay. I won't talk about books today. &n I just want to hang out normally. &n …By the way, did you apply sunscreen? &n Can I put it on for you?
1001402551.korean: 알았어. 오늘은 책 얘기 안 할게.&n나도 그냥 평범하게 놀고 싶으니까.&n...저기, 선크림은 발랐어?&n내가 발라줄까?

1001402552.english: Whenever you're tired, come to me anytime. Okay?

1001402553.english: Even a married couple gets bored quickly. &n So we must constantly try new things. &n In that spirit, today—want to do yoga together?
1001402553.korean: 아무리 부부가 됐어도, 권태기가 오는 건&n금방이에요. 그러지 않도록 늘 새로운&n시도를 해야하죠. 그런 의미에서,&n오늘은 요가… 같이 하실래요?

1001402554.english: You prefer this to a swimsuit? T-That said, we can't stay like this every day… &n I'm satisfied just watching you in your room. Right?
1001402554.korean: 수영복보다 이게 더 좋다고? 그, 그렇다고&n맨날 이렇게 있을 수는 없으니까…&n방에서 보는 걸로 만족해. 응?

1001402555.english: Is your waist okay? &n I just hope it's pleasantly tight—not painful.
1001402555.korean: 허리 괜찮으심까?&n저는 적당히 기분좋게 뻐근하지 말입니다.

1001402556.english: I think each summer from now on, I'll remember this vacation. &n It was the second happiest day in my life. &n The first was… the oath ceremony, of course.
1001402556.korean: 이젠 매년 여름마다 이번 휴가가 떠오를&n것 같아요. 살면서 두 번째로 행복한&n나날이었어요. 첫 번째는… 서약식, 때구요.

1001402557.english: I'm still anxious, afraid I might lose you someday. &n But I will strive to preserve these happy times.
1001402557.korean: 언젠가 주인님을 잃을지도 모른다는 불안감은&n아직 마음속에 있습니다. 그래도… 이 행복한&n시간을 이어나가기 위해 노력하겠습니다.

1001402558.english: Even if the zipper is fixed, you still want me to stay like this…? &n Commander, you're really so hard to figure out… &n But I accept because it's you. You know that, right?
1001402558.korean: 지퍼를 고쳐도 굳이 이렇게 있으라고…?&n사령관은 정말 알다가도 모르겠다니까…&n나니까 받아주는 거야. 알지?

1001402559.english: My direction was off, huh? But since the Commander liked it, &n it wasn't in vain. ...Meow♥
1001402559.korean: 방향성이 잘못됐었던 거군요.&n그래도 사령관님께서 좋아해주셨으니&n헛수고는 아니었습니다. ...냥♥

1001402560.english: "Did I do well…? Then… yes, the fourth…?! &n T-That... can't right now… but instead..."
1001402560.korean: 저, 잘 했나요…? 그럼… 네, 네번째요…?!&n그, 그건 지금은 안 되니까… 그, 그 대신…

1001402561.english: Master? For this trip's souvenir, what would you like?
1001402561.korean: 주인님? 이번 여행의 기념품으로는&n뭘 갖고 싶으세요?

1001402562.english: I'll manage all of the Commander's belongings. &n Is that okay with you?
1001402562.korean: 사령관님의 물품은 전부 제가 관리해 드릴&n거예요. 그래도 괜찮죠?

1001402563.english: As long as I'm with you, I fear nothing.

1001402564.english: What... planning to bind me with a ring…? &n That idea is… pretty novel. W-Want an award or something?
1001402564.korean: 뭐… 반지로 날 구속하겠다는 발상은…&n꽤 참신했어. 뭐, 뭐야… 상이라도 바라는&n거야?

1001402565.english: Is that a confession? I… didn't hate it… Why are you looking at me like that?
1001402565.korean: 고, 고백 말씀이십니까? 그야… 나쁘지&n않았습니다… 왜, 왜 그렇게 절 쳐다보시는&n건가요?

1001402566.english: Yes, I intend to live as long as possible, &n so please don't worry needlessly, Your Excellency.
1001402566.korean: 네, 저는 최대한 오래 살아남을 생각이니&n각하는 괜한 걱정 하지 않으셔도 됩니다.

1001402567.english: If it's now, I can give you as much milk as you want. &n Come… step closer to me.
1001402567.korean: 지금이라면 제가, 사령관님께 우유를&n얼마든지 나눠드릴 수 있어요. 자... 일단&n제 품으로 좀 더 가까이 다가오세요.

1001402568.english: I don't mind if there is no reward. Please give me the next mission quickly.
1001402568.korean: 보상은 없어도 괜찮습니다. 어서&n다음 임무를 주세요.

1001402569.english: From there on, it's my territory. If you're thinking of approaching me, you'll need to muster up a bit more courage.
1001402569.korean: 거기서부터는 내 영역이야. 내게&n다가올 생각이라면, 용기를 좀 더&n내야 할걸?

1001402570.english: I'm not entirely sure about this sticker, but I like it because Xenox looks happy... but my sisters say it doesn't suit him...
1001402570.korean: 이 스티커, 잘은 모르겠지만&n제녹스도 기분 좋아보여서 마음에&n들어... 그런데 언니들은&n안어울린대…

1001402571.english: Ta-da! Here's the adult body you like. Pretty, right?

1001402572.english: Captain Khan is so cool... Commander, you think so too, right? Why don't you go over and strike up a conversation?
1001402572.korean: 칸 대장님은 너무 멋지셔... &n사령관님도 그렇게 생각하시죠?&n가셔서 말이라도 걸어보시는 게&n어때요?

1001402573.english: I am merely following the will of the former Commander and Captain Marie. Please just give me the orders.
1001402573.korean: 전 사령관님과 마리 대장의 뜻에&n따를 뿐입니다. 명령만 내려&n주시길.

1001402574.english: You can't leave out champagne at a party. Have a glass, too... No, Commander, you'd better not have one.
1001402574.korean: 파뤼에는 샴페인이 빠질 수 없죠.&n당신도 한 잔… 아니, 사령관은 안&n마시는 게 좋겠네요.

1001402575.english: Okay, let's start with the meal... What should we prepare next?
1001402575.korean: 자, 일단 식사부터... 그 다음은 뭘&n준비해야 할까요?

1001402577.english: Um... I have something to tell you. Oh, no! It's not urgent, but... um... I guess it won't work out. I'll tell you again next time.
1001402577.korean: 저… 드릴 말씀이 있어요. 아, 아뇨!&n급한 일은 아니지만… 음… 역시&n안되겠어요. 다음에… 다시&n말씀드릴게요.

1001402579.english: Yes, Master. Is there anything I can help you with?

1001402580.english: If you just untie this knot, you can do whatever you want with me… Hehe…
1001402580.korean: 이 매듭만 풀면 날 네 마음대로 할&n수 있어… 후후…

1001402581.english: ...Would you like to try our country's specialty cheese? It's, really delicious, uh…
1001402581.korean: ...우리나라 특산품 치즈,&n맛볼래? 저, 정말 맛있, 어…

1001402582.english: I am getting used to the re-installed emotion module.

1001402583.english: Tomo and Draco came to visit saying they wanted to become friends. It was so much fun that I ended up talking to them for quite a while before I knew it!
1001402583.korean: 토모랑 드라코가 친해지고 싶다고&n찾아왔었어. 즐거워서 나도 모르게&n한참 이야기해버린 거 있지?

1001402584.english: I feel a bit heavy lately... Oh, right. I heard there's a gym! Shall we go check it out?
1001402584.korean: 요새 몸이 좀 무거운데… 아, 맞다.&n체력단련실이 있댔지! 거기 한 번&n가볼까?

1001402585.english: Yes, Commander. There were no problems today either, right?

1001402586.english: The sound is echoing so I can't hear well... Increase the sensitivity a little... Ugh, ahh?! Commander?!
1001402586.korean: 소리가 울려서 잘 안 들리네…&n조금 더 감도를… 으, 으앗?!&n사령관님?!

1001402587.english: Uh, no... when should we start the class?

1001402588.english: Do I look young? There's nothing better than this to get a criminal off guard.
1001402588.korean: 어려 보인다구? 범죄자를&n방심하게 만드는 데엔 이것만 한&n게 없지.

1001402589.english: Did I mention that I can't stand boredom...?
1001402589.korean: 내가 지루한 걸 못 참는 성격이라고…&n말했었던가?

1001402590.english: I can sense your desire to treat me like prey... It is a bit unpleasant.
1001402590.korean: 절 사냥감으로 취급하고 싶은…&n그런 그대의 마음이 느껴지는군요.&n조금 불쾌합니다.

1001402591.english: Orca's conduct these days is a mess. Miss Lindwurm, in particular…
1001402591.korean: 요새 오르카의 풍기가 말이&n아니군요. 특히 린트블룸 양은…

1001402592.english: Th-this is my summer combat uniform. Brownie washed my uniform too, so... Ugh...
1001402592.korean: 이, 이건 제 하계&n전투복이에요. 브라우니가 제&n전투복까지 세탁해버리는&n바람에… 으으…

1001402593.english: I went through a lot of trouble finding these accessories to make Linti stand out~ How is it? Isn't it cute!
1001402593.korean: 린티를 돋보여줄 이&n액세사리들을 구하느라 엄청&n고생했다구요~ 어때요?&n귀엽죠!

1001402594.english: The evaluation from the unit members was very good. Thank you for leading those kids well while I was away.
1001402594.korean: 부대원들에게서 평가가 아주&n좋더군. 내가 없는 동안… 그&n아이들을 잘 이끌어줘서 고맙다.

1001402595.english: Tomo-chan is really... a really amazing colleague... in many ways.
1001402595.korean: 토모 양은 정말... 정말 대단한&n동료에요…&n… 여러 의미로요.

1001402596.english: Hehehe… It was so hot that I tore off all my clothes.

1001402597.english: One last practice… Master, I’m ready to serve you.… Good. I can do it. Eh? Commander…? Since when…?
1001402597.korean: 마지막으로 연습을… 주인님,&n시중을 들 준비가 끝났어요.&n...좋아. 잘 할 수 있어.&n엣? 사령관...? 언제부터…?

1001402598.english: Looking back… I have made so many memories. Fighting alongside my sisters, making friends… it is all thanks to Your Excellency.
1001402598.korean: 돌이켜보면… 많은 추억이&n생겼습니다. 자매들과 함께&n싸우고, 친구가 생기고… &n전부 각하 덕분입니다.

1001402599.english: Surprisingly, this station field is helpful for making desserts. You don't even need any special tools... Commander, shall I make one for you?
1001402599.korean: 의외로 이 역장은 디저트를&n만드는 데 도움이 돼. 별다른&n도구도 필요없구… 사령관, 하나&n만들어줄까?

1001402600.english: Draco! It looks like you've made a really good friend here. I apologize on your behalf.
1001402600.korean: 드라코! 이곳에서 죽이 잘 맞는&n친구가 생겨버린 모양이군요. 제가&n대신 사과드리겠습니다.

1001402601.english: It's a bit stuffy... but whatever. I got a good scolding from a cute girl for not wearing underwear.
1001402601.korean: 조금 갑갑한데… 뭐, 됐어. 속옷을&n안 입었다가 귀여운 아가씨한테&n혼쭐이 났거든.

1001402602.english: You say it suits you? It's so obvious you're just kidding. I told you, you're all talk...
1001402602.korean: 어울린다고? 그냥 하는 말인거 다&n티나거든? 하여튼 입만&n살았다니까…

1001402603.english: This chinchilla is named 'Tiger'. This little guy is timid just like me, so I always take him with me. Eh, Tiger...? Does he like the Commander?
1001402603.korean: 이 친칠라는 ‘타이거’라고 해요. 이&n아이도 저처럼 겁이 많아서 항상&n데리고 다녀요. 엣, 타이거...?&n사령관님이 마음에 드는 거야?

1001402604.english: Are you referring to alcohol? Hehe, waiting for the master... I apologize for the intrusion.
1001402604.korean: 술 말이옵니까. 후후, 주인을&n기다리다… 먼저 실례했사옵니다.

1001402605.english: To think that my humble bodyguard would display such a disgraceful spectacle... I am ashamed to face my master... Th-I am embarrassed when you stare at me like that...
1001402605.korean: 호위무사인 소첩이 이런 추태를&n보이다니, 주인님을 뵐 낯이…&n그, 그리 빤히 보시면&n부끄럽습니다...&n

1001402606.english: Practice is essential for a great show, but the physical ability to execute difficult moves is also important. Look. Me? You mean I can do this too?
1001402606.korean: 멋진 쇼를 위해선 연습이 필수지만,&n어려운 동작을 소화할 수 있는 &n신체능력도 중요해요. 보세요. &n저, 이런 것도 된다구요?

1001402607.english: Hmm, hmm hmm~♪ Ah, this is… zzzz, I was having so much fun that I did it without even realizing it… !
1001402607.korean: 흠, 흠흠~♪ 아, 이건…&n즈즈, 즐거워서 저도 모르게…!

1001402608.english: This outfit was prepared by Brownie, whom I met during religious activities. She said that if I struck a pose like this, even a human male would feel the urge to fulfill her duties...
1001402608.korean: 이 의상은 종교 활동 시간에 만난&n브라우니가 준비해 주었습니다.&n그, 그리고 이런 포즈를 취하면&n인간 남성도 의무를 다할 생각이 들&n것이라고...

1001402609.english: This is the nun's habit Miss Armand prepared for me. It was a bit tight, so I asked Audrey to alter it separately. Does it suit me?
1001402609.korean: 이건 아르망 양이 준비해준 수녀복이&n에요. 조금 답답해서 오드리에게 따로&n수선을 부탁했죠. 어울리나요?

1001402610.english: I survived through struggle. Battle, destruction, madness… that is my everything.
1001402610.korean: 나는 투쟁을 통해 살아남았다.&n전투, 파괴, 광기…&n그것이 나의 전부다.

1001402611.english: When I'm grooming my cute Baek O-mil, I get so focused without even realizing it, um... hehe, my body starts to heat up a little.
1001402611.korean: 내 귀여운 백오밀 군을 정비할때는&n나도 모르게 집중해버려서, 음…&n헤헷, 조금 몸이 달아올라버려.

1001402612.english: Given my fighting style, this chest fat is extremely cumbersome. Commander, do you happen to know why I was designed to be so inefficient?
1001402612.korean: 제 전투 방식 상, 이 흉부 지방은&n몹시 거추장스럽습니다. 제가 이렇게&n 비효율적으로 설계된 이유를&n사령관님은 혹시 알고 계십니까?

1001402613.english: We say that it was used for various events in the past.

1001402614.english: As long as I am here, no external enemy will be able to set foot in our territory.
1001402614.korean: 내가 있는 한, 그 어떤 외적도 우리의&n영역에 발을 들이지 못할 것이다.

1001402615.english: This is an outfit for one of Pokkuru's subordinates. It is cool thanks to the modifications, but... I, I wish it had been a little cuter...
1001402615.korean: 이건 뽀끄루 씨의 부하 중 한 명의&n의상입니다. 개조해주셔서 시원하긴&n합니다만… 조, 조금 더 귀여운&n의상이었으면 좋았을텐데...

1001402616.english: As you know, Commander, my squad members are really fun to tease. Neri thinks I'm always right, and Undine screams... Hehe.
1001402616.korean: 사령관도 아시겠지만, 저희 부대원&n들은 참 놀리기 좋아요. 네리는 제&n말이 다 맞는 줄 알고, 운디네는&n빽빽 소리지르고… 킥킥.

1001402617.english: Don't worry. It is not just troops that determine victory or defeat.
1001402617.korean: 걱정마시오. 승패를 결정하는 건&n병력 만이 아니라오.

1001402618.english: How is it? I didn't really wear this to show the Commander, but I'll listen to your thoughts.
1001402618.korean: 어때? 별로 사령관에게 보여주려고&n입은 건 아니지만, 감상 정도는&n들어줄게.

1001402619.english: It is truly... a beautiful dress. I can only imagine how much effort you must have put into it, Audrey... It is an honor for me to wear it.
1001402619.korean: 정말... 아름다운 드레스군요.&n오드리 님이 얼마나 고생하셨을지…&n제가 입게 되어서 영광입니다.

1001402620.english: Because of those pests... I'm only showing you my swimsuit now. Hehe, please look at me, Master...
1001402620.korean: 그 해충들 때문에... 이제야 제&n수영복을 보여드리네요.&n후후, 저를 봐주세요, 주인님...

1001402621.english: W-well... now that I've spent some time with you, I guess humans do have their decent sides, in their own way. Like how you take care of even the little things, or how you're foolishly kind... Ugh, I shouldn't have said that.
1001402621.korean: 무, 뭐… 지내다 보니 인간도 인간 나름&n대로 괜찮은 구석도 있긴 하네.&n사소한 것도 챙겨주는 점이라던가,&n바보같이 착한 점이라던가…&n윽, 괜히 말했어.

1001402622.english: Um, this… Yes. It is a keychain that is part of a set with the one you said was cute last time. If you like it… feel free to come back and pick another one.
1001402622.korean: 저, 이거… 네. 저번에 귀엽다고 하셨던&n것과 한 세트인 열쇠고리입니다.&n마음에 드시면… 또 오셔서 골라보셔도&n괜찮습니다.

1001402623.english: Aren't you going to tease me about having such a humble palate? Hehe, because even a cooked potato is a one-of-a-kind delicacy when eaten with His Majesty.
1001402623.korean: 입맛이 서민적이라고 놀리시지 않기&n에요? 후훗, 폐하와 함께 먹으면&n익힌 감자라도 세상에 둘도 없는&n별미니까요.

1001402624.english: I found you out of a sense of duty, Master... but before I knew it, you have become so meaningful to me.
1001402624.korean: 주인님을 찾아낸 건 사명감 때문&n이었지만… 어느새 주인님께선 제게&n이렇게나 큰 의미가 되었네요.

1001402625.english: Hahaha. As expected, I never get bored when I'm with the Commander. Not only does he always provide something to smash, but he also makes sure to clean up the mess properly after the battle is over.
1001402625.korean: 하하핫. 역시 사령관이랑 있으면&n지루할 틈이 없어. 언제나 박살낼&n거리를 만들어주는데다가… 전투가&n끝난 뒤에도 확실하게 뒷처리를&n해주니까 말이야.

1001402626.english: It is the first time I have been treated like this. Not as a king or a knight, but as a woman. ...It doesn't feel bad.
1001402626.korean: 이런 대우를 받는 건 처음이라네.&n왕이나 기사가 아닌, 한 명의&n여성으로서 말일세.&n...나쁘지 않은 기분이군.

1001402627.english: Hey, Commander. Do you like me? Really? I see... You really like me... Huh? Me? As for me... I'm not sure~?
1001402627.korean: 있지, 사령관. 사령관은 나 좋아해?&n그래? 그렇구나아… 나를 정말 좋아&n하는구나… 응? 나? 나는… 글쎄에~?

1001402628.english: Since Hachiko is Master's bride now, she will become more mature. Ugh, waaah... If you stroke me like that, I want to be held again...
1001402628.korean: 하치코는 이제 주인님의 신부니까,&n더 의젓해질거예요. 으, 으앙… 그렇게&n쓰다듬어 주시면 또 안기고 싶어져요...

1001402629.english: "D-You say you’ll go to the battlefield with me? Please don’t say such things, not even as a joke! As your adjutant, and as your spouse... I cannot tolerate such a thing."
1001402629.korean: 가, 같이 전장에 나서시겠다니, 농담&n으로라도 그런 말씀은 마십시오!&n사령관님의 부관으로서도, 그,&n배, 배우자로서도… 그런 건 용납할&n수 없습니다.

1001402630.english: I know my tastes are a bit strange, too. But Commander... do you... understand...? Kyaaa~ Really? Then let's try this this time!
1001402630.korean: 저도 제 취향이 조금 이상하다는 건&n알고 있어요. 그래도 사령관님은…&n이해, 해주시는 건가요…?&n꺄아~ 진짜요? 그러면 저희 이번엔&n이거 해봐요!

1001402631.english: I feel like I've really gained weight lately... Is it because it's warm and I'm burning fewer calories... You say it comes off if you get a massage? The Commander is always kneading me, but it's not coming off!
1001402631.korean: 요새 진짜로 살이 찐 것 같아… 따뜻&n해서 열량 소모가 적어져서 그런가…&n...마사지해주면 빠진다구? 사령관이&n맨날 조물조물 하는데도 안빠지잖아!

1001402632.english: Lately, it feels like I'm the only one who's happy... Master, how about making a vow with your siblings too? Hehe, once you make the vow... everyone will show unexpected sides of themselves, just like me.
1001402632.korean: 요새 너무 저만 행복한 것 같아서…&n주인님, 동생들과도 서약을 하는게&n어떠세요? 후훗, 서약을 하고 나면…&n다들 저처럼 의외의 모습을 보여줄&n거예요.

1001402633.english: Um… please forget what I said. My emotions were heightened and I just slipped out. ...Heh. You’ve become unnecessarily relaxed… I, I truly love you, Master. Are you, are you satisfied now?
1001402633.korean: 그… 제가 했던 말은 잊어주세요.&n감정이 고조되어 말이 헛나왔을 뿐입&n니다. ...큭. 쓸데없이 여유로워지셔선…&n저, 정말 사랑합니다, 주인님.&n이, 이제 만족하셨습니까?

1001402634.english: Your Excellency. There are some snacks Alvis left in my room... um, there are so many... would you come over and have some...?
1001402634.korean: 저, 각하. 제 방에 알비스가 두고간&n간식들이 있는데… 그, 너무 많아서…&n오셔서 드셔보시겠습니까…?

1001402635.english: I am always grateful that you chose a low-ranking person like me. Your Excellency, in that sense... could you please install a karaoke system on board? I can sing for you all day long!
1001402635.korean: 저같은 말단을 선택해 주신 것에&n언제나 감사하고 있습니다. 각하,&n그런의미에서 저… 함내에 노래방 좀&n설치해줄 수 있으십니까? 하루종일도&n불러드릴 수 있지말임다!

1001402636.english: If I had my way, I’d get rid of everything else—everyone else—except my younger siblings. But if I did that, I’d be hated by my Master... Hehe, I’m a good Lilith, you know?
1001402636.korean: 마음 같아서는 동생들을 제외한 다른&n것- 다른 분들을 전부 치워버리고&n싶어요. 하지만 그랬다간 주인님께&n미움을 받을테니까… 후훗, 저는 착한&n리리스라구요?

1001402637.english: Hehe. Just as the Commander said, Neri is super sturdy. Look at this... abs... Ahaha, I feel kind of embarrassed... That's strange...
1001402637.korean: 헤헹. 사령관의 말대로, 네리는 엄~청&n튼튼하다는 말씀. 보라구, 이 복… 근…&n아하하, 왠지 부끄럽네… 이상하다…

1001402638.english: Um, Master. May I… warm up your bed for you again today…? I remembered you saying last time that it felt good to be warm… Oh, I can’t stay until morning today. ...Ugh, I can’t…
1001402638.korean: 저, 주인님. 오늘도… 침대를 덥혀드려도&n될까요…? 저번에 따뜻해서 기분좋다고&n하신게 생각나서… 오, 오늘은 아침까진&n못 있어요. ...우으, 안되는, 데…

1001402639.english: Actually, I was a bit self-conscious about the scent module, but since the Commander said he likes it… huh? Th-thin, still, you can't smell it all day…!
1001402639.korean: 사실 향기 모듈은 조금 콤플렉스&n였는데, 사령관이 좋다고 해주니까…&n어? 그, 그래도 하루종일 맡는 건&n안 돼…!

1001402640.english: If possible, I don't want to be apart from the Commander for even a second. But I know that would put the Commander in a difficult position... so I can handle it on my own.
1001402640.korean: 가능하면 사령관과는 1초도 떨어지고&n싶지 않아요. 그래도 그러면 사령관이&n곤란해 하신다는 걸 아니까…&n혼자서도 잘할 수 있어요.

1001402641.english: After meeting my companion... my beliefs changed. I now follow my companion's will, not the light.
1001402641.korean: 반려를 만나고... 제 신념이&n바뀌었습니다. 저는 이제 빛이 아닌,&n반려의 뜻을 따릅니다.

1001402642.english: To think we’ve become this close, Commander… it still feels like a dream. Uh, last night… was like that too…
1001402642.korean: 사령관님과 이런 사이가 되다니…&n아직도 꿈만 같아요.&n어, 어젯밤도… 그랬구요...

1001402643.english: Linty, who used to be the cutest soldier in the world, has become the cutest bride in the world! ...Hehe, I like you. You are the coolest commander in the world.
1001402643.korean: 세상에서 제일 귀여운 군인이었던&n린티는, 세상에서 제일 귀여운 신부가&n되었답니다! ...에헤헷, 좋아해요.&n세상에서 제일 멋진 사령관님.

1001402644.english: I’ve never thought about ordinary affection. Well, as you know, that’s just my personality. ...Don’t be disappointed. Isn’t it only natural that you are an exception?
1001402644.korean: 평범한 애정에 대해서는 생각해본 적&n없다. 뭐, 알다시피 이런 성격이니까&n말이야. ...실망하지 마라. 그대에게만은&n예외인게 당연하지 않은가.

1001402645.english: Before I knew it, you naturally exuded an atmosphere befitting a Commander-in-Chief. You look truly magnificent today, Master.
1001402645.korean: 어느새 자연스럽게 총사령관다운&n분위기가 흐르게 되셨네요.&n오늘도 정말 멋지세요, 주인님.

1001402646.english: There was a time when I thought it would be nice to know your feelings, Commander, through hacking. ...Now? You are such an honest person when it comes to expressing yourself; what need would there be for that?
1001402646.korean: 해킹으로 사령관님의 마음을 알 수&n있으면 좋겠다고 생각했던 적이 있었죠. &n..지금요? 이렇게나 표현이 솔직하신&n분인데, 그게 무슨 필요가 있겠어요?

1001402647.english: Hehe, the ring... Hmm, it's a bit of a shame I couldn't take a picture back then. Should I ask that guy first... ...Huh? W-what are you eavesdropping on, you idiot!
1001402647.korean: 헤헷, 반지… 음, 그때 사진을 못찍어둔&n게 조금 아쉬운 걸. 일단 그녀석&n한테라도 물어봐야하나…&n...어? 무, 뭘 엿듣고 있는 거야, 멍청아!

1001402648.english: Oh! So we're riding the Sawfish again today, right? Let's go! We don't need a destination or a jackpot. It's just the two of us, Commander and me, leaving!
1001402648.korean: 오! 오늘도 소우피쉬에 타는 거지?&n가자! 목적지도 대박도 전부 필요없어.&n그냥 사령관하고 나하고 단 둘이서&n떠나는 거야!

1001402649.english: Lately, I've been making protective gear for you, Oppa~ Besides that, I'm also making nutritional supplements, functional underwear, and more! Hehe. Oppa, why are you surprised?
1001402649.korean: 요새는 오빠를 위한 보호장비를&n만들고 있지롱~ 그것말고도 영양제랑&n보충제에 기능성 속옷도!&n킥킥. 오빠, 왜 놀라는거야~?

1001402650.english: Master...? I smell another child...? Hehe... It's fine. I can just cover it up with mine right away... Huhu... Just stay still for a moment...
1001402650.korean: 주인님…? 다른 아이의 냄새가&n나는데요…? 히히… 괜찮아요. 바로&n제 걸로 덮어씌워버리면 되니까…&n후후… 잠깐만 가만히 계세요...

1001402651.english: Flying with the Commander is really fun. The scenery flowing beneath my feet, the sound of the wind... Oh, right! Don't play around with your hands like that next time. It's dangerous. ...In many ways.
1001402651.korean: 사령관이랑 같이 비행하는 건 정말&n즐거워. 발 밑으로 흘러가는 풍경이랑,&n바람소리랑… 아, 맞다! 다음부터는&n그렇게 손장난 하지마. 위험하단 말야.&n...여, 여러가지로.

1001402652.english: Huh? Nah, I don't tell the others about things when it's just the two of us~ I, I want to keep that to myself...
1001402652.korean: 응? 에이, 우리 단 둘이 있었을 때&n얘기는 다른 애들한테 안 해~&n그, 그런건 나만 알고 있고 싶으니까...

1001402653.english: It doesn't seem like she's noticed yet, but... I think we should be careful of Miss Talonfeather.
1001402653.korean: 아직 눈치챈 것 같진 않습니다만…&n그 탈론페더 양은 조심해야 할 것&n같습니다.

1001402654.english: Trees? Just put this against them once and that's it. The real problem was the Elven kids who kept bothering me.
1001402654.korean: 나무? 그냥 이거 한 번 갖다 대면&n끝이야. 오히려 자꾸 귀찮게 구는&n엘븐 애들이 문제였지.

1001402655.english: Do you like this outfit? ...That's a relief. I'm not really interested in things like this, so if you like it, that's all that matters.
1001402655.korean: 이 의상이 마음에 드나? ...다행이군.&n나는 이런데엔 별로 관심이 없으니까,&n그대가 좋다면 그걸로 됐다.

1001402656.english: So the day has really come. I only ever imagined it... It's nothing, Commander.
1001402656.korean: 진짜로 이런 날이 오는구나.&n상상만 했었는데…&n아무것도 아냐, 사령관.

1001402657.english: I'm worried about my younger siblings. If I wear clothes like this, I can't make up an excuse anymore...
1001402657.korean: 동생들이 신경쓰이네요. 이런 옷을&n입으면 더이상 둘러댈수가 없는데...

1001402658.english: ...It is merely a full-body protective suit. Please refrain from making obscene remarks.

1001402659.english: As my affection for you grows deeper, Master… I feel like things are finding their proper place. I do not expect anything in return. All I need is for you to stay safe by my side.
1001402659.korean: 주인님을 향한 연정이 깊어질수록…&n뭔가 제자리를 찾아가는 기분입니다.&n보답을 바라지는 않습니다. 주인님께서&n무사히, 제 옆에 계셔주시기만&n하면 됩니다.

1001402661.english: Ah, I left Tiger with Lord Ignis for a moment. He was staring at me blankly... Th-nothing bad, right...?
1001402661.korean: 아, 타이거는 잠깐 이그니스님에게&n맡겨뒀어요. 무표정으로 뚫어져라&n보시던데… 벼, 별 일 없겠죠…?

1001402662.english: It's hard to run because it's tight and the shoes are uncomfortable, but you like things like this, Commander, right? Hehe, I heard about it from Audrey!
1001402662.korean: 꽉 끼고 신발도 불편해서 달리기&n힘들지만, 사령관님은 이런 걸&n좋아하시는 거죠?&n헤헷, 오드리 님한테 들었어요!

1001402663.english: I received something called a 'hamburger' from the chef here. ...H-h-h, I wonder how to eat this...
1001402663.korean: 이곳의 요리사로부터 ‘햄버거’라는 것을&n받았다. ...호, 혹시 이것은 어떻게 먹는&n것인지...

1001402664.english: D-Please don't tease me for being clumsy! All I've heard since I was little is stories from servants... Lord, please... teach me a lot from now on?
1001402664.korean: 서, 서툴다고 놀리지 마시어요!&n어려서부터 들은거라곤 시종의&n이야기밖에 없어서…&n주공께서 앞으로... 많이 알려주시어요?

1001402665.english: I'm having a good holiday. Thank you, Commander.

1001402666.english: Hehe, how long do you plan to just stand there? I've been waiting here for you to come...
1001402666.korean: 후훗, 언제까지 그렇게 가만히&n서있기만 할 생각이지? 난 여기서&n당신이 오기만을 기다리고 있었는데...

1001402667.english: Master, just a little closer... so I can protect you better. That's right... that's it.
1001402667.korean: 주인님, 조금만 더&n가까이… 제가 더 잘 지킬&n수 있게요. 옳지…&n그거예요.

1001402668.english: Hmm... I feel like I've been acting strange every day lately. Master... Do you know why?
1001402668.korean: 흐응… 나 요샌 매일&n이상한 것 같아. 주인님…&n어째서 그런 건지 알아?

1001402669.english: Lately, I've been studying unofficial histories. I realized there are many things needed to become a wife.
1001402669.korean: 요즘은 야사를 공부하고&n있어요. 아내가 되기&n위해서 필요한 게&n많더라고요.

1001402670.english: I'm glad the Commander... likes my style... I was worried because I gained weight...

1001402671.english: … … Huh? You don't like this song?

1001402672.english: Machines have emotions... no, emotions modules. That is where our honor comes from.
1001402672.korean: 기계에게도 감정이… 아니 감정&n모듈이 있습니다. 저희의&n명예로움이 거기서 오는 겁니다.

1001402673.english: As long as I am here, nothing can hinder the expansion of our denomination.
1001402673.korean: 제가 있는 한, 그 무엇도 우리&n교단의 확장을 방해할 순&n없습니다.

1001402674.english: How does time spent with you pass by so quickly...
1001402674.korean: 당신과 함께하는 이 시간은 어찌&n이리도 빨리 지나가는지…

1001402675.english: When Master speaks to me… I feel like my senses become more acute. I wonder why?
1001402675.korean: 주인님께서 말을 거시면…. 감각이&n더 예민해지는 느낌이에요. 어째서&n그럴까요?

1001402676.english: I will no longer hide my feelings. As Your Majesty's companion… I will proudly share Your Majesty's heart… and my own.
1001402676.korean: 더 이상은 제 감정을 숨기지&n않겠어요. 폐하의 반려로써…&n당당하게 폐하의 마음과… 그리고&n제 마음도요.

1001402677.english: Commander, don't you think the timing of your confession is a bit late? You've kept me waiting too long.
1001402677.korean: 사령관, 고백의 타이밍이 좀&n늦었다고 생각하지 않나? 너무 날&n기다리게 했군.

1001402678.english: I have decided not to use the hidden flavor anymore. Because that is… a deception of my husband…
1001402678.korean: 숨김 맛은 더 이상 쓰지 않기로&n했사옵니다. 그건… 부군을&n기만하는 것이기에…

1001402679.english: I can do anything for you, Master. Just give me the order to do anything. I will accomplish anything...
1001402679.korean: 주인님을 위해서라면 뭐든 할 수&n있어요. 뭐든지 시켜만 주세요.&n어떤 일이라도 해낼 테니…

1001402680.english: Commander, no, honey! I've been waiting just to talk to you.
1001402680.korean: 사령관, 아니 여보! 누난 여보랑&n이야기하기만 기다렸어.

1001402681.english: It doesn't matter how many fans he had. I've become my husband's fan...
1001402681.korean: 팬이 얼마였든지 상관없어. 내가&n남편의 팬이 돼버렸으니…

1001402682.english: This is the first time I’ve actually seen the Companion sisters since coming here. They all treat me so well, and Fenrir licks me every day to cheer me up.
1001402682.korean: 컴패니언 언니들을 실제로 본 건 여기&n와서가 처음이에요. 다들 잘 대해주시고,&n펜리르 언니는 기운 내라고 매일 저를&n핥아주세요.

1001402683.english: I used to love watching you sleep, Master... but since we started sleeping together, I haven't been able to do that, so I'm a little sad about it.
1001402683.korean: 잠든 주인님의 모습을 보는 걸&n좋아했었는데… 같이 자게 된 이후엔&n그러지 못해서 조금 아쉬워요.

1001402684.english: There are too many kids at the beach... How about it? If you're not busy... it would be nice to stop by and rest for a bit.
1001402684.korean: 해변에는 애들이 너무 많단 말이지…&n어때? 바쁜 일 없으면…&n잠깐 쉬고 가도 괜찮은데.

1001402685.english: Jumping into the cool water will make you feel better, Commander. Hehe, it's okay! Even if you fall into the water, I, Neri, will save you!
1001402685.korean: 시원-한 물에 뛰어들면 사령관 기분도&n좋아질 거야. 히힛, 괜찮아! 사령관이&n물에 빠져도 이 네리가 구해줄 테니까!

1001402686.english: Temptation? No, you're wrong. Starting now… I’m planning to kidnap the Commander. Just stay right there.
1001402686.korean: 유혹? 아니, 틀렸어. 지금부터…&n사령관님을 납치할 생각인데?&n거기 가만히 있어줘.

1001402687.english: Ah, Commander. The others left first. ...Did you come looking for me? Uh-huh, no. I was just getting bored after finishing what I was reading.
1001402687.korean: 아, 사령관. 다른 애들은 먼저 갔어.&n...나, 날 찾아 온 거야? 으응, 아니야.&n나도 읽던 거 다 읽어서 심심하던&n참이었어.

1001402688.english: Feather is upright and sincere, but she is a child who needs a pillar of support. So please be very kind to her, Commander.
1001402688.korean: 페더는 올곧고 성실하지만 버팀목이&n필요한 아이에요. 그러니까 사령관님이&n많이 예뻐해주세요.

1001402689.english: I don't dislike the vulnerable side you show only to me, Commander. In fact, I'm glad I can be of help. I will be your pillar of support.
1001402689.korean: 저에게만 보여주시는 사령관님의 약한 모습,&n싫지 않아요. 오히려 도움이 되어드릴 수&n있어서 기쁜 걸요? 제가 사령관님의&n버팀목이 되어드릴게요.

1001402690.english: This pose? Of course, it's to build flexibility. And… for more possibilities.
1001402690.korean: 이 자세요? 당연히 유연성을&n기르기 위한 거죠. 그리고…&n좀 더 많은 가능성을 위해서요.

1001402691.english: I don't like it these days. Everyone's calling me Audrey, Ms. Audrey, and Sister Audrey! What's so special about a swimsuit anyway...
1001402691.korean: 요즘 마음에 안들어.&n다들 오드리, 오드리님, 오드리 언니!&n그까짓 수영복이 뭐라고...

1001402692.english: Are you talking about discipline? You told me it’s okay to let loose a little at times like this. I’ve told the kids to relax and take it easy too, so please don’t worry.
1001402692.korean: 군기 말입니까? 이런 때 정도는 풀어져도&n괜찮다고 말씀하셨지 말입니다.&n애들도 각 풀고 편하게 쉬라고 말해놨으니&n걱정하지 마십쇼.

1001402693.english: My eyes? Ah, um... It's my first vacation in a while, so I put on a little makeup. Um... how do I look...?
1001402693.korean: 눈이요? 아, 그…&n오랜만에 휴가라서 메이크업을 조금 했어요.&n저… 어떠세요…?

1001402694.english: I thought I'd be able to get a ton of samples if I came here... but with so many Bio-Roids here, I can't even move around properly...! Eek?! Please don't touch me!
1001402694.korean: 이곳에 오면 샘플을 엄청나게 얻을 수 있을&n줄 알았는데… 이렇게 바이오로이드 분들이&n많아서야 제대로 돌아다니지도 못하지&n않습니까…! 흐익?! 손대지 말아주십시오!

1001402695.english: Since it's a long-awaited vacation, please get plenty of rest. I have prepared everything you need for your rest, Master.
1001402695.korean: 모처럼 휴가니까 푹 쉬세요. 주인님이&n쉬시는 데에 필요한 건 전부 준비해뒀습니다.

1001402696.english: I, I didn't want to come here in this state! A werewolf dragged me here by force... Ugh, seriously. I told you, you're no help...!
1001402696.korean: 나, 나는 이런 꼴로 오고 싶진 않았다구!&n워울프가 강제로 끌고 왔단 말야…&n으으, 진짜. 도움이 안된다니까…!

1001402697.english: To fill in my shortcomings, I tried learning a little bit of 'cuteness.' Meow~ Meow~... What do you think?
1001402697.korean: 제 부족한 부분을 채우기 위해 ‘애교’ 라는&n것을 조금 배워봤습니다. 냐앙~ 냥~&n...어떠십니까?

1001402698.english: Baekto prepared everything so that I could perform the third ritual. Thank you so much— Ugh… I’m so embarrassed…
1001402698.korean: 백토가 제가 세 번째 의식을 치를 수 있도록&n준비해줬어요. 정말 고맙- 으으…&n너무 부끄러워...

1001402699.english: To think I can spend a vacation with my master like this… it really feels like a dream.
1001402699.korean: 이렇게 주인님과 휴가를 보낼 수&n있다니… 정말 꿈만 같아요.

1001402700.english: Yes, Commander. Thanks to you looking after us, there are no problems here.
1001402700.korean: 네, 사령관님. 사령관님이 봐 주고 계신&n덕분에 여긴 아무 문제 없답니다.

1001402701.english: My dream is… to gaze at the golden fields with you, Master. Someday… that dream will come true, won't it?
1001402701.korean: 제 꿈은… 주인님과 함께 황금빛 들판을&n바라보는 거예요. 언젠가는…&n그 꿈이 이뤄질 수 있겠죠?

1001402702.english: Master, do you happen to have any seeds? There is a little empty space in my field... M-could you please fill it with your seeds?
1001402702.korean: 주인님, 혹시 갖고 계신 씨앗 없으신가요?&n제 경작지에 빈 공간이 약간 있는데요…&n주, 주인님의 씨앗을 가득 뿌려주실 수&n있나요?

1001402703.english: Since that day, I sometimes think that real magic might be spending time with the Commander.
1001402703.korean: 그날 이후로 가끔씩 진짜 마법은&n사령관님과 함께 지내는 게 아닐까라고&n생각해요.

1001402704.english: Hmm... we've gotten a bit closer now... and since this is a private setting... it should be okay, right? Then I'll speak freely. Gentleman... Thank you. Thank you for choosing someone like me.
1001402704.korean: 음… 이제 좀 가까워졌고… 사적인 자리니…&n괜찮겠지? 그럼 편히 말하겠다. 젠틀맨…&n고맙다. 이런 날 선택해 줘서.

1001402705.english: Huh? I was originally designed this way.
1001402705.korean: 응? 난 원래 이렇게 설계 된거라고.

1001402706.english: Now, shall we set up our own new rules? Don't worry, the nights we spend together are going to be terribly long, so let's just take our time... and talk... Hehe...
1001402706.korean: 이제, 우리 둘만의 규칙을 다시 세워볼까?&n걱정 마, 나와 함께 보내는 밤은 끔찍할&n만큼 길 테니까, 우리 서로 천천히…&n이야기나 나눠 보자고… 후후….

1001402707.english: Are you talking about this outfit? It's one of the few everyday clothes I own. Please don't tease me about being behind the times.
1001402707.korean: 이 옷 말씀이신가요? 제겐 몇 없는&n일상복입니다. 유행에 뒤처졌다고 놀리진&n말아주세요.

1001402708.english: Hmm... Commander, is this kind of uncool woman your hobby? Well... I don't really care.
1001402708.korean: 흐음... 사령관 각하는 이런 멋도 없는&n여자가 취미신가요? 뭐… 저는 딱히&n상관없습니다.

1001402709.english: I have a responsibility to watch over the growth and prosperity of all children on this earth. I decided to participate in the production of a milk commercial to provide nutrition for children.
1001402709.korean: 저는 이 땅 위의 모든 아이들의 생육과&n번성을 지켜볼 책임이 있답니다. 아이들의&n영양 공급을 위해서 우유 CF 제작에&n참여하기로 결정했어요.

1001402710.english: There have been times when I wished humans would disappear. Though I doubt the Iron蟲 came down because of that.
1001402710.korean: 인간님들이 사라졌으면&n좋겠다고 생각했던 적도 있어요.&n그것 때문에 철충이 내려온 건&n아니겠지만요.

1001402711.english: As long as it satisfies me, I don't care what it is. Whether it's a battle or a sticky relationship... Hehe...
1001402711.korean: 날 만족시켜줄 수만 있다면&n그게 뭐든 상관없어. 그게&n전투든, 끈적한 관계든…. 후후…

1001402712.english: Should I call you Senior...? Or Teacher...?

1001402713.english: Hehe, you've grown this much taller? Ah, my invention skills are still the same, so you don't have to worry.
1001402713.korean: 후후, 키도 이만큼이나&n컸다구? 아, 발명 실력은&n그대로니까 걱정 안해도&n괜찮아~.

1001402714.english: Ah, I was just thinking for a moment. It's nothing special.
1001402714.korean: 아, 잠깐 생각 좀 하고 있었어요.&n별 건 아니에요.

1001402715.english: When you have to send soldiers to their deaths... you have no choice but to go with them.
1001402715.korean: 병사들을 사지로 보내야만 할&n때에는… 같이 가 주는 수밖에&n없지요.

1001402716.english: If you thought I only made clothes, you are greatly mistaken. To pursue ultimate beauty, you must always maintain the body shape in its best condition.
1001402716.korean: 제가 옷만 만든다고 생각하셨다면&n큰 착각이에요. 궁극의 미를&n추구하려면, 언제나 바디쉐잎을&n최상의 상태로 유지해야하죠.

1001402718.english: I'm not embarrassed... I'm not embarrassed... Not embarrassed... Waaah...
1001402718.korean: 안 부끄럽다… 안 부끄럽다…&n안 부끄… 후에엥…

1001402719.english: You worked hard today, didn't you? Um... would you like me to give you a shoulder massage?
1001402719.korean: 오늘도 업무를 보느라&n고생하셨죠… 저… 어깨 라도&n주물러 드릴까요?

1001402720.english: I would be grateful if you could let me be alone.

1001402721.english: I'm so happy that I can be of help to you, Master, like this...
1001402721.korean: 이렇게 주인님께 도움이 될 수&n있다니... 정말 기뻐요.

1001402722.english: It’s a silly festival, but... I decided to hang out with you just for today. Right... Today, I... am a gift for you.
1001402722.korean: 바보 같은 축제지만... 오늘 하루&n정도는 어울려 주기로 했어. 그래…&n오늘은 내가... 당신을 위한&n선물이야.

1001402723.english: You're asking where the delicious cheese is? Hey... here it is...

1001402724.english: A feature has been added to allow you to perform solo missions. What do you think?

1001402725.english: Commander, do you like reading books? I recently read an epic poem by a certain knight…
1001402725.korean: 사령관, 책 읽는 거 좋아해? 내가&n요번에 어떤 기사의 서사시를&n읽었는데…

1001402726.english: The Captain is going to spar? Haha, you're kidding, right? No matter how strong the Captain is... Ugh, to tell me to take off my exoskeleton... P-That's unfair!
1001402726.korean: 대장이 스파링을 해주겠다고?&n하하, 농담이지? 대장이 아무리&n튼튼해도… 윽, 외골격을&n벗으라니… 치, 치사하잖아!

1001402727.english: Hehe. If my friends saw me right now, they would definitely all be surprised, right?
1001402727.korean: 헤헤. 친구들이 지금 제 모습을&n본다면, 분명 다들 놀라겠죠?

1001402728.english: Captain Khan is taking a bath nearby, too. Why don't you go wash her? As for me… hehe… I'll stay right here.
1001402728.korean: 칸 대장님도 근처에서 목욕하고&n계세요. 가서 씻겨드리는 게&n어때요? 저는… 후후… 여기&n있을게요.

1001402729.english: This switch… is certainly more suited for education than combat.

1001402730.english: I guess I like classic things like this because it was designed that way, but I like it.
1001402730.korean: 그렇게 설계되었기 때문에 내가&n이런 클래식한 걸 좋아하는&n거겠지만, 난 맘에 들어.

1001402731.english: Thanks for worrying about me, but I absolutely hate things like protective gear.
1001402731.korean: 걱정해주는 건 고맙지만,&n난 보호장비 같은 건 딱 질색이야.

1001402732.english: This outfit is too shameless. I simply cannot understand your taste.
1001402732.korean: 이 차림은 너무 파렴치합니다.&n그대의 취향은 도저히 알 수&n없군요.

1001402733.english: Please don't say I'm too strict. If it weren't for me, Orca would... Haa, I have a headache...
1001402733.korean: 너무 엄격하다고 하지는 말아&n주세요. 제가 아니면 오르카는…&n하아, 두통이…

1001402734.english: You say it's as amazing as I heard? I don't understand what you mean... I have such a shabby body that just waddles around...
1001402734.korean: 듣던 대로 굉장하다니, 무슨&n말씀이신지 모르겠어요…&n뒤뚱거리기나 하는 볼품없는&n몸인데…

1001402735.english: Sigh, Armand is seriously so closed-minded. Making such a fuss over a skirt length like this... every time I talk about it, I feel like my cuteness is leaking out.
1001402735.korean: 에효, 아르망은 진짜 앞뒤 꽉꽉&n막혔어요. 이 정도 치마 길이&n가지고 호들갑은... 이야기할&n때마다 제 귀여움이&n새어나가는 기분인 거 있죠?

1001402736.english: Beautiful? Ha. There is no meaning in such artificial forms. You will realize it soon enough.
1001402736.korean: 아름답다고? 하. 이런 인공적인&n조형 따위엔 아무런 의미도 없다.&n그대도 조금 있으면 알게 되겠지.

1001402737.english: There are so many things written in this notebook. Shall we read a few lines? …Sigh.
1001402737.korean: 이 수첩에는 정말 많은 것들이&n적혀 있지요. 몇 줄 읽어&n볼까요? … 하아.

1001402738.english: Master. Something feels off with my body. It's hot, and I'm hungry... Why have I become like this...?
1001402738.korean: 주인님. 나, 몸이 이상해. 덥고,&n배고프고… 나 왜 이렇게 된&n거야…?

1001402739.english: Ah, are you busy...? Th-then, um... I, I'll sit next to you for a moment. ...Haa.
1001402739.korean: 아, 바쁘신가요...? 그, 그러면&n저… 여, 옆에 잠깐만&n앉아있을게요. ...하아.

1001402740.english: I was able to endure even the most difficult missions thanks to Your Excellency's watchful care. I hope that I was of even the slightest bit of help.
1001402740.korean: 힘든 임무도 각하께서 지켜봐 주신&n덕분에 버텨낼 수 있었습니다. &n아주 조금이라도… 제가 도움이&n되었기를 바랍니다.

1001402741.english: A sweet scent? Ah! M-m-sorry. I forgot to tell you. I'm receiving perfume components into my blood via an auxiliary module... By any chance... it's not... okay...?
1001402741.korean: 달콤한 향기? 아! 미, 미안.&n말해주는 걸 잊었네. 보조 모듈로&n혈액에 향수 성분을 공급받고&n있거든... 혹시… 별로, 야…?

1001402742.english: It is inappropriate to be doing such things with other team members during work hours, Commander. I will at least make sure to keep my team members in check.
1001402742.korean: 업무시간에 다른 대원들과… 그런&n것을 하시는 것은 부적절합니다,&n사령관님. 제 팀원들만이라도&n단속하도록 하죠.

1001402743.english: Here, chocolate. I'm not really into cute little things like this, but it's nice once in a while.
1001402743.korean: 자, 초콜릿. 이런 아기자기한 건&n별로 취향은 아니지만 가끔은&n괜찮네.

1001402744.english: Why am I in this mess too… Elven actually seems to be enjoying it, though…
1001402744.korean: 왜 나까지 이런꼴을… 엘븐은&n오히려 즐기는 것 같지만…

1001402745.english: Ack... I, I'm sorry. I've always been a coward... Ugh, I need to get used to being here quickly...
1001402745.korean: 꺅… 죄, 죄송해요. 저는 원래부터&n겁이 많아서… 우으, 빨리 여기에&n익숙해져야 하는데…

1001402746.english: I have no other means left. To win my master's heart, I merely... make this request.
1001402746.korean: 이제 소첩에겐 더이상 남은&n방도가 없사옵니다. 주인의 마음을&n얻기 위해 그저… 청할 뿐이옵니다.

1001402747.english: It was an outing recommended by you, Master, and yet I made such a mistake... I am truly sorry. I was a bit nervous... and ended up stumbling.
1001402747.korean: 주인님께서 권해주신 나들이인데&n이런 실수를… 송구합니다. 다소&n긴장하여... 발을 헛디디고&n말았습니다.

1001402748.english: No matter how difficult the situation, you can overcome it all with a positive mindset. Now, Commander, smile too!
1001402748.korean: 아무리 힘든 일도 긍정적인 마음가짐&n이면 전부 이겨낼 수 있어요.&n자, 사령관도 스마일~

1001402749.english: You remembered that I said I wanted to go out with you, Commander, right? I'm really... happy.
1001402749.korean: 사령관님과 놀러가고 싶다는 말, &n기억 해주신거죠? 정말... 기뻐요.

1001402750.english: That is correct. My duty is to carry on the Savior's will. To do so, I need to bear and raise a child of a human male.
1001402750.korean: 그렇습니다. 제 의무는 구원자의 뜻을&n잇는 것. 그러기 위해서는 인간&n남성의 아이를 낳아 양육할 필요가&n있습니다.

1001402751.english: Your Majesty should have seen the expressions on the faces of the Kohei men when they saw me... Oh my, Your Majesty's expression isn't much different, is it?
1001402751.korean: 저를 본 코헤이 분들의 표정을&n폐하도 보셨어야 하는데…&n어머, 폐하의 표정도 별로&n다르지 않네요?

1001402752.english: You are leading a lot of weaklings. If it weren't for the master's command… I would have trampled them all.
1001402752.korean: 나약한 것들을 많이 이끌고 있군.&n주인의 명령이 아니었다면…&n전부 짓밟아 버렸을거다.

1001402753.english: Huh? What's wrong? Is this your first time seeing maintenance? Then you can watch from over there. Hehehe, my cute Omilia. I'll make you comfortable right away.
1001402753.korean: 응? 왜그래? 정비하는 거 처음 봐?&n그럼 거기서 구경해도 괜찮아.&n에헤헤, 귀여운 오밀아. 내가 금방&n편하게 해줄게.

1001402754.english: The Captain and the Colonel occasionally visit me and talk about this and that regarding 'love'. To be honest, I don't really know much about that either, but I can't leave first...
1001402754.korean: 대장님과 대령님은 가끔씩 저를 찾아&n와, ‘사랑’에 대해 이것저것 말씀&n하시곤 합니다. 사실 저도 그런것은&n잘 모릅니다만, 먼저 자리를 뜰 수는&n없어서...

1001402755.english: A fairy dress... I really wish I could look as pretty as a fairy...
1001402755.korean: 요정의 드레스... 정말 제가 요정처럼&n예쁘게 보인다면 좋을 텐데...

1001402756.english: Fighting to protect something is difficult, but noble. The Commander must be well aware of that.
1001402756.korean: 무언가를 지키기 위한 싸움은&n어렵지만, 숭고하다.&n사령관도 그 점은 잘 알고 있겠지.

1001402757.english: Ahahahaha, burn beneath my feet! ...Was it okay? I practiced with the help of Pokkuru.
1001402757.korean: 아하하하하, 내 발 밑에서 타올라라!&n...괜찮았나요? 뽀끄루 씨의 도움을&n받아서 연습했습니다.

1001402758.english: Ah. Hehehe, right, right? You just can't take your eyes off a charming woman like me, can you? What should I do... Shall I show you just a little bit?
1001402758.korean: 앗. 우후후, 그쵸그쵸? 저 같은&n매력적인 여성에게서 눈을 뗄 수가&n없으신거죠? 어떻게 할까…&n살짝만, 보여드릴까요?

1001402759.english: Horizon are good soldiers. It's a relief that you took charge of them.

1001402760.english: You're asking if I have something to say? Th-there's no way I would! Hey, just do your job properly. You stupid commander.
1001402760.korean: 하고 싶은 말이 있지 않냐고?&n그, 그런 게 있을리가 없잖아?&n이, 일이나 똑바로 해. 멍청이 사령관.

1001402761.english: I tend to have my mood swayed by my outfit... so since I'm wearing clothes like this instead of a tight-fitting uniform, I feel a little...
1001402761.korean: 저는 복장에 따라 기분이 좌우되는&n편이라… 꽉 끼는 제복이 아니라&n이런 옷을 입고있으니, 조금…

1001402762.english: I heard from Lilith that there are pests leaving their scent on Master's bed. Hehe... Could you wait just a moment? I'll fill it up with mine soon...
1001402762.korean: 리리스에게 주인님의 침대에 냄새를&n묻히는 해충들이 있다고 들었어요.&n히히… 조금만 기다려주시겠어요?&n곧 제 걸로 채워드릴테니...

1001402763.english: Why are you standing so far away? There's plenty of space, so come closer. W-wait. Not that close- Ack... W-Won't you let go of this? Th-Even if you do that, I... Ugh...
1001402763.korean: 뭘 그렇게 멀찍이 있어? 자리 넓으&n니까 더 가까이 오던가. 자, 잠깐.&n그렇게 가까이는- 꺅… 이, 이거 안 놔?&n그, 그런다고 내가… 으…

1001402764.english: Don't you find my personality frustrating? I thought being more honest would be, cu, cute... Ugh...?! I, I retract that. So... please, please stop...
1001402764.korean: 제 성격이 답답하진 않으십니까? 저는&n더 솔직한 편이 귀, 귀여울거라고 생각&n하는데… 윽…?! 처, 철회하겠습니다.&n그러니까… 그만, 그만 해주세요...

1001402765.english: Your Majesty must appreciate my charm, right? You are truly worthy of the person I love.
1001402765.korean: 폐하께선 제 멋을 알아주시는 거겠죠?&n역시 제가 사랑하는 분 답네요.

1001402766.english: Internal work? It’s nothing compared to the work you’ve been entrusted with, Master. Mr. Armand helps out a lot too... Master. It’s okay if you share some of the burden you’ve been carrying with us.
1001402766.korean: 내부 업무요? 주인님이 맡으신 일에&n비하면 별거 아니에요. 아르망 님도&n많이 도와주시고… 주인님. 저희에게&n좀 더… 짊어지신 것을 나눠주셔도&n괜찮아요.

1001402767.english: Commander, you look... Is something wrong? Come on, don't be like that, cheer up. Here. You like this, don't you?
1001402767.korean: 사령관, 오늘따라 표정이... 안좋은&n일이라도 있어? 자자, 그러지말고&n기운내. 자, 이거. 좋아하잖아?

1001402768.english: I was so flustered back then that I completely forgot. Huh? I mean the Knight's Oath. I, Prester Johanna, King of the Crusader, solemnly swear to be my Lord's faithful shield until the day I die.
1001402768.korean: 그때는 경황이 없어 깜빡하고 말았군.&n응? 기사의 맹세 말일세. 나, 십자군 왕&n프레스터 요안나는 목숨이 다하는&n그날까지 주군의 충실한 방패가 될&n것을 거룩히 맹세하겠네.

1001402769.english: Commander, you know I’m watching everything you’re doing with the others, okay? ...W-what are you talking about? I-I’m not jealous, okay?
1001402769.korean: 사령관도 알겠지만, 나는 사령관이&n다른 애들이랑 뭐하고 있는지 다&n보고있다구? ...뭐, 뭐래. 지, 질투하는&n거 아니거든?

1001402770.english: I took a bridal lesson...? from Sister Lilith! Hehe, she said my hardworking Master would like it if I gave him a massage. How is it, Master? Does it feel good?
1001402770.korean: 리리스 언니한테 신부, 수업...?을 받았&n어요! 헤헤, 고생한 주인님께 안마를&n해드리면 좋아할 거랬어요. 어떠세요,&n주인님? 기분 좋아요?

1001402771.english: Commander, you don't seem to mind at all even when we are fully armed right beside you. That is exactly the point... Hehe, no. I will follow you, Commander, until the day my life ends.
1001402771.korean: 사령관님께선 저희가 무장을 갖춘 채&n옆에 있어도 전혀 신경쓰지 않으시는&n군요. 바로 그점이… 후후, 아닙니다.&n이 한 목숨 다하는 그때까지,&n사령관님을 따르겠습니다.

1001402772.english: Commander, look here~ Hehe, it came out looking great. ...Huh? Come on, I don't do that kind of thing with photos anymore. I can just ask you, Commander.
1001402772.korean: 사령관님, 여기보세요~ 후훗, 멋지게&n나왔네요. ...네? 에이, 이젠 사진으로&n그런 거 안해요. 그냥 사령관님한테&n부탁하면 되는걸요?

1001402773.english: Hey. Later, when the war is over, do you want to go to Antarctica together? You won't have to worry about the cold if you stay by my side, and we can talk to the kids there and look at the scenery... I'm sure you'll like it, Commander.
1001402773.korean: 있지. 나중에 전쟁이 끝나고 나면 같이&n남극에 가볼래? 추운 건 내 옆에&n있으면 괜찮을거구, 거기 애기들이랑&n이야기도 하구, 경치도 구경하구…&n분명 사령관도 마음에 들 거야.

1001402774.english: Ugh... Lyrics...? Yes. I suppose they are necessary to serve you, Master... I’ll learn them from Daphne. Ah, I’ll call the other sisters too, so please come along, Master. While I practice, please wait for me while chatting with your sisters.
1001402774.korean: 윽… 가, 가사요…? 네. 주인님을 모시려&n면 필요하겠죠… 다프네에게 배워볼게&n요. 아, 다른 동생들도 부를테니 주인&n님도 같이 가요. 제가 연습하는동안,&n자매들이랑 이야기하며 기다려주세요.

1001402775.english: Master, there really is no end to your foolishness. What would you have done if I hadn't been by your side— Ah… D-Please don't suddenly hug me. I-It feels… unpleasant.
1001402775.korean: 주인님의 바보짓에는 정말 끝이없군요.&n제가 곁에 없었으면 어떡할 뻔- 앗…&n가, 갑자기 끌어안지 말아주시죠.&n기, 기분… 나쁩니다.

1001402776.english: You mean something I like? I see. You said last time that you would tell me next time. I… Your Excellency the Commander…! Ugh… I, I… like Your Excellency the Commander.
1001402776.korean: 좋아하는 것, 말입니까. 그렇군요.&n저번에 다음에 말씀드리겠다고 했었죠.&n저는… 사령관 각하를…! 읏…&n사, 사령관 각하를… 좋아, 합니다.

1001402777.english: Do you realize that when I talk to the others, more than half of the conversation is about His Excellency? If I were to bring up the story of the passionate night I spent with His Excellency— Ah, ahaha... Alright, I was wrong...
1001402777.korean: 다른 인원들이랑 이야기 해보면 절반&n이상이 각하에 대한 이야기인거 아십&n니까? 거기서 제가 각하와 보낸 뜨거운&n밤 이야기를 꺼내면- 아, 아하하…&n자, 잘못했슴다...

1001402778.english: Master, why don't you put rings on my younger siblings as well? After all, someone as great as you deserves many concubines.
1001402778.korean: 주인님. 제 동생들에게도 반지를&n끼워주시는게 어떠세요? 주인님처럼&n훌륭하신 분에게는 첩이 많아야&n하니까요.

1001402779.english: W-Makeup? Ugh, Undine betrayed me! She asked me to keep it a secret…!…I was learning it because I wanted to look pretty for the Commander…
1001402779.korean: 화, 화장? 윽, 운디네가 배신했구나!&n비밀로 해달라고 했는데…!&n...사령관한테 예쁘게 보였으면 해서&n배우고 있었단 말야...

1001402780.english: Thank you for caring for someone as unworthy as me. Is there anything else I can do for you...? Oh, cooking? Yes. I'll prepare it for you right away.
1001402780.korean: 모자란 저를 이렇게까지 아껴주셔서&n감사해요. 제가 더 해드릴 건 없나요…?&n아, 요리요? 네. 바로 준비해드릴게요.

1001402781.english: I like the time I spend talking while being held by the Commander like this the most during the day. ...Hey, do you feel the same way, Commander?
1001402781.korean: 하루 중에 이렇게 사령관한테 안겨서&n이야기하는 시간이 제일 좋아.&n...저기, 사령관도 그래?

1001402782.english: Is this what it feels like to be healed...? When I am by the Commander's side, it feels like all my painful memories... just... vanish. ...Can I become that kind of presence for the Commander, too?
1001402782.korean: 이게 치유된다… 라는 느낌인 걸까요?&n사령관 곁에 있으면 아픈 기억들은&n전부... 사라져버리는 것 같아요.&n...저도 사령관에게 그런 존재가&n될 수 있을까요?

1001402783.english: So, my return was… to meet my companion. Holding my companion in my arms is the greatest joy to me, more than anything else.
1001402783.korean: 제가 다시 강림한 것은… 반려를&n만나기 위함이었군요. 반려를 품에&n안는 것이 제게는 그 무엇보다&n큰 기쁨입니다.

1001402784.english: M-Commander. As for our honeymoon… are you, are you promising us? Yes. I'll be looking forward to it.
1001402784.korean: 사, 사령관님. 저희, 신혼여행은…&n야, 약속해주시는 건가요?&n네. 기대하고 있을게요.

1001402785.english: Hmm... You aren't shy anymore these days, are you? Since you call me Linti so naturally, um... Ah! I guess I should think of a new nickname. Kya ha ha, I'm getting flustered!
1001402785.korean: 흐음… 요새는 부끄러워 하지&n않으시네요? 너무 자연스럽게&n린티라고 불러주시니까, 음… 아!&n새로운 애칭을 생각해봐야겠어요.&n꺄하핫, 당황한다 당황한다!

1001402786.english: My dear. Do you have any other plans after work today? If not, I’d like to spend it with you. ...Just because we were together yesterday doesn’t mean we can’t be today.
1001402786.korean: 그대. 오늘 업무 후에 다른 일정은&n있나? 없다면 나와 보냈으면 좋겠는데. &n...어제 함께 있었다고 오늘은&n그러지말라는 법은 없지.

1001402787.english: To think I’m receiving such undeserved love… Lately, everything feels like a dream. Oh, you’re saying you aren’t dedicating yourself to you to repay that kindness? Even if that weren’t the case… I would have fallen for you anyway.
1001402787.korean: 이런 과분한 사랑을 받다니… 요즘은&n전부 꿈만 같아요. 어머, 그 은혜를&n갚기 위해 주인님께 헌신하는 건&n아니라구요? 그렇지 않았어도…&n주인님께 반했을 거예요.

1001402788.english: Hehe, I'm glad to hear you like my figure. Since I'm a woman, I was a little worried, you know. ...Oh my. It was... unnecessary worry, wasn't it?
1001402788.korean: 후후, 제 몸매가 마음에 드신다니&n다행이네요. 저도 여자니까 조금&n걱정했었거든요. ...어머.&n쓸데없는… 걱정이었군요?

1001402789.english: ...I have just a very brief moment today, and if the Commander asks, I could stay with you— So, a prior engagement? Th-then, I guess it can't be helped. Well, that's a shame. It was a chance for you to be with me.
1001402789.korean: ...오늘 아주 잠깐 시간이 나는데,&n사령관이 부탁한다면 같이 있어줄&n수도 있- 서, 선약? 그, 그러면&n어쩔 수 없지. 뭐, 안타깝게 됐네.&n이 나랑 있을 수 있는 기회였는데.

1001402790.english: You ask if it's boring? Hmm, well... compared to the days when I roamed the seas in search of treasure, life these days does feel a bit static. B-but still, I found another treasure here...
1001402790.korean: 따분하지 않냐고? 음, 뭐… 보물을&n찾아 바다를 누비던 때에 비하면&n요새는 삶이 좀 정적인 감은 있지.&n그, 그래도 여기서 다른 보물을&n찾았으니까...

1001402791.english: Hmm, well. I am a little jealous seeing you love the other older sisters, but... Hehehe, I have a trump card too!
1001402791.korean: 음, 뭐. 오빠가 다른 언니들을&n사랑해주는 걸 보면 조금 부럽긴&n하지만… 후후후, 나한테도 비장의&n카드가 있으니까!

1001402792.english: Hehe... Master, my very own Master... I truly love you... If you wish, Master, I can give you anything... even my life...
1001402792.korean: 후후… 주인님, 나만의 주인님…&n정말로 사랑해요… 주인님께서&n원하신다면 무엇이든…&n목숨이라도 드릴 수 있어요…

1001402793.english: I told you I'm not heavy! Here, look. It's packed full of shells like this... uh...? Why is this in here... Th-this is... well...! Since the Commander is busy, sometimes when I feel lonely...!
1001402793.korean: 나 안무겁다니까? 자, 봐봐. 여기&n이렇게 포탄이 가득 들어있, 어…?&n이게 왜 여기에… 이, 이건 그러니까…!&n사령관은 바쁘니까 가끔 외로울때…!

1001402794.english: Commander, can't you talk to Captain Panther about this? Ugh, our unit's uniform isn't pretty in the slightest. Uh... y-really? If you think it's pretty, Commander, then I'm fine with it...
1001402794.korean: 사령관님이 팬서 대장한테 말 좀&n해주면 안 돼? 으휴, 우리 부대 군복은&n요만큼도 안예쁘단 말이야.&n어… 그, 그래? 사, 사령관님이&n예쁘다면야 나는 괜찮은데...

1001402795.english: Sometimes I think it would be satisfying to get caught. ...I also want to brag.
1001402795.korean: 가끔씩은 들키는 게 시원할 거란&n생각도 합니다. ...자랑을 하고 싶기도&n하고요.

1001402796.english: For now, if you tell me to do something, I’ll do it. However… whether I work hard will depend on my motivation that day.

1001402860.korean: 요리요? 당연히 가능…&n어, 어라? 내 건틀릿이&n어디갔지…?

1001402861.english: Don't worry. Even dressed like this, there is no problem protecting the sisters.

1001402862.english: It’s not that I can’t see. It’s just… my eyesight is sensitive, so it’s hard for me to keep my eyes open for long…
1001402862.korean: 앞이 보이지 않는것은 아닙니다.&n그저… 시각이 예민해 눈을 오래&n뜨고 있기 힘들기에…

1001402865.english: H-H-You mean I spilled it! What are you talking about! It was all intentional!

1001402866.english: May I ask why you are observing this hologram in that way? … I am a little… embarrassed, but…

1001402867.english: Because of how I look, I've often been misunderstood for a long time. I actually prefer reading books alone to drinking and listening to music...

1001402868.english: Did you know? They say our models used to stargaze from orbital platforms back in the day. Well... just saying.

1001402869.english: Commander? Did you enjoy this festival?

1001402870.english: Thanks to you, Commander, I am enjoying such luxury… I feel so good…

1001402871.english: Education is supposed to be thrilling. Me too... and you too, Master.

1001402872.english: How's my bike? I painted it myself. The exhaust pipe? It's just for decoration. Isn't it cool?
1001402872.korean: 내 바이크 어때? 도색도 내가&n했어. 배기구? 이건 그냥 장식이야.&n멋있지 않아?

1001402873.english: Once the battle is over and the excitement has subsided, sometimes a strange thought crosses my mind... Hmm...
1001402873.korean: 전투가 끝나고 흥분이 가라앉으면,&n가끔씩 묘한 생각이 들곤 해…&n흐음…

1001402874.english: Wait, hold on... why did you dress me in this leather?
1001402874.korean: 자, 잠깐… 어째서 제게 이런&n가죽을 입힌 겁니까?

1001402875.english: According to records, this attire is said to be the most suitable for cracking down on public indecency.
1001402875.korean: 기록에 따르면 이 복장이 풍기&n문란을 단속하는데 가장&n적합하다고 합니다.

1001402876.english: I actually prefer the combat uniform I used to wear. It has lots of pockets and is roomy, so it covers my body well.
1001402876.korean: 저는 원래 입던 전투복이 더&n좋아요. 주머니도 많고, 품도&n넓어서 몸도 가릴 수&n있으니까요.

1001402877.english: It's not exactly rebellious or anything, you say? This outfit just maximizes Linti's cuteness~
1001402877.korean: 딱히 불량스럽거나 한 건&n아니라구요? 이 옷이 린티의&n귀여움을 극.대.화 할 수 있을 뿐~

1001402878.english: I have reviewed the records of the battles you commanded. I look forward to the upcoming battles.
1001402878.korean: 그대가 지휘한 전투 기록들을&n열람해봤다. 앞으로의 전투가&n기대되는군.

1001402879.english: Everyone has a secret or two, so don't worry too much, Commander.
1001402879.korean: 누구든 비밀 한두 개 정도는&n가지고 있는 법이니, 너무 걱정&n마세요 사령관님.

1001402880.english: Really? Are you going to give me meat? Wow! ...Hehe, Master, you eat with me too.
1001402880.korean: 진짜? 고기 줄 거야? 와아!&n...헤헷, 주인님도 같이 먹어.

1001402881.english: I prepared some chocolate to repay you for the 'Well Done' candy. Would you… have some…?

1001402882.english: I wanted to commemorate today, however modestly. Just the two of us, Your Excellency.

1001402883.english: Chef, you're softer than I saw in the records... though you're still super scary...
1001402883.korean: 주방장님, 기록에서 본 것보다는&n부드러우시네... 그래도 엄청&n무섭긴 하지만…

1001402884.english: I often hear that I look too cold and scary, but it doesn't really bother me. It is all necessary work as an operations officer.
1001402884.korean: 너무 차가워보여서 무섭다는 말은&n많이 듣지만, 별로 신경쓰이진&n않습니다. 전부 작전관으로서&n필요한 일이니까요.

1001402885.english: I'm used to different attire. In the past, our company was dedicated to decorating the appearance of our products.
1001402885.korean: 다른 복장에는 익숙해. 예전에&n우리 회사는 상품들의 겉모습을&n꾸미는데에 열심이었으니까.

1001402886.english: But I still have to do the work... Here. It's Elven Milk chocolate flavor. They say it was super popular.

1001402887.english: Me? I'm actually pretty sturdy. This bulletproof vest is much heavier than it looks, and if you add the weight of the gas bomb and the cage...
1001402887.korean: 저, 꽤나 튼튼하다구요?&n이 방탄복도 보기보다 엄청 무겁구,&n가스 폭탄이랑 케이지 무게까지&n하면…

1001402888.english: Looking back, I have never had the opportunity to be alone with my master like this before. Except for when we first met... that is.

1001402889.english: Master, could you help me change my clothes...? I really can't do it by myself...
1001402889.korean: 주인님, 소첩이 옷을 갈아입는&n것을 도와주실 수 있으신가요…?&n혼자서는, 도저히…

1001402890.english: We used to be very close with the other circus members. I hope we can build similar bonds with the people here.

1001402891.english: Is it okay for me to wear clothes like this instead of my uniform...? Neri and Undine are definitely going to tease me...

1001402892.english: You may not be able to conceive offspring of a human male right now, but you must prepare in advance for the day that will come someday.

1001402893.english: I did read a prayer to baptize His Majesty, but... hehe, I don't really remember it.
1001402893.korean: 폐하께 세례를 내려드리려고 무슨&n기도문을 읽어보긴 했는데… 후훗,&n기억이 잘 안나네요.

1001402894.english: Grrr... Do you have the confidence to control me properly? Keeping me locked up here is not a good decision.

1001402895.english: Mechanic uniform? Ah, I do have a separate one, but... uh, it's a hassle to go out of my way to take it out, you know?

1001402896.english: Commander, why are you speaking to us in such a friendly manner? I think it would be better to focus on work rather than small talk.

1001402897.english: There are times when I feel sad because I am the fattest among my sisters.

1001402898.english: In the past, when I stood in the middle of the city in this form, I was showered with awe and gratitude from the citizens. Yes, it was a similar reaction to the young members here who saw me.
1001402898.korean: 과거, 이 모습으로 도시&n한가운데에 서있을 땐 시민들의&n경외와 감사를 한 몸에 받았었지.&n그래, 나를 본 이 곳의 어린&n대원들과 비슷한 반응이었다.

1001402899.english: I did hear that the Magical Girls and Pokkuru were preparing something, but I didn't expect them to recommend it to me...
1001402899.korean: 마법소녀 분들과 뽀끄루 씨가&n무언가를 준비한다는 이야기는&n듣긴 했습니다만, 저한테&n권해주실 줄은...

1001402900.english: What? I'm not small at all! Can't you see these feminine curves? Sigh, if you go around saying things like that, I'm not responsible if you lose your popularity.
1001402900.korean: 네? 저는 하나도 안 작거든요?&n이 여성스러운 굴곡이 안 보이&n세요? 에휴, 그런 말씀을 하고&n다니시면 인기 없어져도 전&n몰라요~

1001402901.english: Even if you praise me like that… being good at war isn’t something to be proud of.

1001402902.english: Hey, you look really busy? ...Me? I, I'm busy too, but I have to keep an eye on whether that idiot commander is doing his job properly.
1001402902.korean: 마, 많이 바빠보이네? ...나?&n나, 나도 바쁘지만, 멍청이&n사령관이 제대로 일하는지&n감시해야 하니까.

1001402903.english: I wonder what my children will think if they see this... It's a little embarrassing.

1001402904.english: It's filled with Master's scent... It feels like I'm being held by Master...
1001402904.korean: 주인님의 향기가 가득해…&n주인님에게 안겨 있는 것 같아...

1001402905.english: Human. What is it about me that made you take a vow? ...Hmm, uh, I see. Me? I've never once said that I like humans. You stupid Commander.
1001402905.korean: 인간. 인간은 내 어디가 좋아서 서약을&n한 거야? ...흐음, 그, 그렇구나. 나?&n나는 인간을 좋아한다고는 한 번도&n말한 적 없는데? 바보같은 사.령.관.

1001402906.english: Others often come to me for advice. I cannot go into detail, but… the Commander is truly loved. Me, too…

1001402907.english: Your Majesty? Would you please say 'I really love you, Charlotte' like last time? Hmm... Thank you. Then this time, just like last time...

1001402908.english: Since you were my first master, I was inexperienced in many ways, wasn't I? But you said you liked me, so I was able to work even harder.

1001402909.english: Even though it might look like I live a carefree life, I'm actually taking care of myself in my own way. My skin, my figure... Th-that's right. I'm doing it to look pretty for the Commander. Any complaints?

1001402910.english: I can't seem to get used to this exhilaration when speaking with my lord... It feels quite different from when I head out into battle. What... M-My lord, how can you say such embarrassing things so unhesitatingly?!

1001402911.english: Ah, Commander. There's a strand of my hair stuck to your clothes. Come here, I'll take it off for you. Here, it's all done. You look really cool today, Commander.

1001402912.english: Heehee… They say the war has to end for me to have a baby. H-Hachiko, hurry up and… pretty… Hehe, Master. Until then, Hachiko will protect you.

1001402913.english: Do you know that it has become easier for me to encourage my unit members these days? More than any other words, a single phrase like "Let's fight for the Commander" is enough. This is thanks to the trust the Commander has placed in us.

1001402914.english: Hahaha, hahahaha... Haa, Commander... Ah, you're here? I'll tell you the situation I was just imagining, so could you do it to me exactly as I imagined?

1001402915.english: Are you cold? Hmm... Come here. If we stick close like this... how is it? It's okay, right? Hehe, male Emperor penguins incubate their eggs with their bodies pressed against each other like this, you know? S-Commander, too... Later, um... us... Ah, it's nothing.
1001402915.korean: 추워? 음… 자, 이리와. 이렇게 몸을&n딱 붙이고 있으면… 어때? 괜찮지?&n헤헷, 황제펭귄 수컷은 이렇게 몸을&n붙이고 알을 품거든? 사, 사령관도…&n나중에, 저… 우리… 아, 아무것도 아냐.

1001402916.english: You really have to keep this a secret from the younger siblings, okay? Especially… things like the pet name I call you when we're alone, or how I look when we're in the room together… I'm begging you.

1001402917.english: You mean cooking? If even someone like you, Master, is growing, it is only natural that my skills are improving. Do you have any idea how pathetic you were at the beginning? Now, well... I’m alright. Alright.

1001402918.english: I do not know much about anything other than combat. ...A vacation, you mean? Just the two of us, Your Excellency... Yes. I look forward to it.
1001402918.korean: 저는 전투 이외의 것은 잘 모릅니다.&n...휴가, 말씀이십니까? 각하와 단&n둘이서… 네. 기대하고 있겠습니다.

1001402919.english: Hehe! This Brownie has nothing to fear now that I am under the Commander's favor. Even Captain Marie won't be able to treat me disrespectfully! Hehe, you know I'm joking, right? I have absolutely no intention of using His Excellency's love in that way.
1001402919.korean: 헤헹! 이 브라우니, 사령관 각하의 총애&n를 받으니 두려울게 없지말입니다. 마리&n대장님도 절 함부로 대하지 못 할 검다!&n헤헷, 농담인거 아시지 말입니다? 각하&n의 사랑을 그런 식으로 이용할 생각은&n조금도 없슴다.

1001402920.english: I am sorry, Master. I didn't know I wouldn't be able to handle it. Will you punish the wicked Lilith who underestimated your capacity...?
