1001402921.english: Now that I've become, well, that kind of relationship with the Commander, I feel like I've gotten so much stronger! Hmm, yeah. From now on, call me Super Nerineri!
1001402921.korean: 사령관이랑 그, 그런 사이가 되고&n나니까, 훨-씬 강해진 것 같아!&n음, 그래. 이제부턴&n슈퍼 네리네리라고 불러줘!

1001402922.english: Thank you always, Ni... Ugh... I really, really love you, Master... I'm so glad I was able to meet someone like you...
1001402922.korean: 언제나 고맙다, 니… 우으… 정말,&n정말로 좋아해요 주인님…&n주인님 같은 분을 만날 수 있어서&n정말로 다행이에요...

1001402923.english: What do you want for dessert today? I organized them here so it’s easier to choose.… …Huh? …Me?!
1001402923.korean: 오늘 디저트는 뭘 먹고 싶어? 고르기&n편하라고 여기 정리해 왔어.&n…...응? ...나?!

1001402924.english: They say the way we address each other changes once we become a married couple? ...Y-Honey... Eh? Th-That was a funny thing- Ack?! ...Ah, I like the hug, but why are you laughing...?
1001402924.korean: 부부가 되면 호칭이 바뀌어야&n한다고 하네요? ...여, 여보…&n엣? 우, 웃긴 말이었- 꺅?!&n...아, 안아주시는 건 좋은데&n왜 웃으시는건가요…?

1001402925.english: Companion. I wonder if you are getting too close to other women these days… If it were me, I could… accept all of your anguish.
1001402925.korean: 반려. 요즘엔 너무 다른 여성들을&n가까이 하는것이 아닌지…&n...저, 저라면 반려의 그 번뇌를 모두…&n받아들일 수 있습니다.

1001402926.english: Ah, Commander. I’m going out with the other squad members. Hehe, we’ve gotten really close now. Ah, but still… you’re number one in my heart, Commander.
1001402926.korean: 아, 사령관님. 다른 대원들이랑&n놀러가기로 했어요. 후훗, 이제&n많이 친해졌어요. 아, 그래도…&n제 마음속의 1번은 사령관님이에요.

1001402927.english: Thanks to the Commander saying I was cute all night long, I'm overflowing with cuteness! Hehehe, today's Linti is invincible!
1001402927.korean: 사령관님이 밤새도록 귀엽다고&n해주신 덕분에 귀여움 성분이 가득!&n우후후, 오늘의 린티는 무적이에요!

1001402928.english: You ask if I'm bothered by spending time with other women? Hahaha. This is really amusing. Oh, right. Should I call my squad members today as well? Then I'll be able to tell right away.
1001402928.korean: 다른 여성과 시간을 보내는게&n신경쓰이지 않냐고? 하하하핫. 정말&n재미있군. 아, 그래. 오늘은 내&n부대원들도 부르도록할까.&n그러면 바로 알 수 있을거다.

1001402929.english: Huh? Ah, ah, was I, was I staring at you, Master? I, I'm sorry. I didn't even realize it... Hehe, before I knew it, the roles have been reversed.
1001402929.korean: 네? 아, 제, 제가 주인님을&n빤히 보고 있었나요? 죄, 죄송해요.&n저도 모르게… 후훗, 어느새 전이랑&n입장이 반대가 되어버렸네요.

1001402930.english: The secret to my figure is consistent exercise. Ah, Commander, would you like to join me? You are already excellent, of course, but... the way I see it, you seem to have plenty of potential for growth...
1001402930.korean: 제 몸매의 비결은 꾸준한 운동이죠.&n아, 사령관님도 함께 하시겠어요?&n지금도 물론 훌륭하시지만…&n제가 보기엔 성장 가능성이&n충분해 보이는데...

1001402931.english: Do you think I wanted to be born with this kind of personality? I've never once regretted anything until now... but everything went wrong after meeting you. Th-that is... take responsibility until the end.
1001402931.korean: 나, 나라고 이런 성격으로 태어나고&n싶었는 줄 알아? 지금껏 후회한 적은&n한 번도 없었는데... 널 만나고 다&n이상해졌어. 그, 그러니까…&n끄, 끝까지 책임져.

1001402932.english: It’s truly amazing to see how the Commander treats the others. That masterful skill... seriously, even Lady Bride-Triaina fell right in.
1001402932.korean: 사령관이 다른 애들을 대하는 걸&n보면 참 놀라워. 그 능수능란한 솜씨는&n진짜… 이 브라이드-트리아이나 님도&n홀랑 넘어갔고 말이야.

1001402933.english: I can't believe I missed this... Huh? Oh, I mean Titan. You sit first, and like this... when I sit on your lap, ta-da!
1001402933.korean: 내가 이런 걸 놓치다니… 응?&n아, 타이탄말이야. 오빠가 먼저 앉구,&n이렇게… 내가 오빠 무릎에&n앉으면, 짠!

1001402934.english: Since Master said so, I won't harm the pests. As long as Master loves me the most...
1001402934.korean: 주인님의 말씀이 있었으니&n해충들에게 해를 입히지는 않을&n거예요. 주인님이 저를 가장&n사랑해주시기만 한다면요...

1001402935.english: There’s no need to even guess what the Commander is thinking anymore. We just have to hear it directly, right? Let’s see… Hehe, my heart is pounding so hard?… Aren’t you curious about me?
1001402935.korean: 이젠 사령관의 생각은 추리할 필요도&n없지. 직접 들어보면 되는걸?&n어디보자… 헤헷, 엄청 두근거리네?&n...나는 어떤지 안궁금해?

1001402936.english: Rumors about the Commander? Hmm, nothing much these days. Like how sexy he looks when commanding, or how cute he looks coming out for breakfast half-asleep in the morning... something like that?
1001402936.korean: 사령관님에 대한 소문? 음, 요새는&n별 다른 거 없는데? 지휘하는 모습이&n섹시하다거나, 아침에 비몽사몽 밥&n먹으러 나오는 모습이 귀엽다거나…&n뭐 그정도?

1001402937.english: … I can’t let anyone know that a military commander harbors ill feelings… but sometimes I can’t stand it...
1001402937.korean: …한 군의 지휘관이 삿된 감정을 품은&n걸 알릴 수는 없는데…&n가끔씩은 참을 수가...

1001402938.english: Ah, Commander. Do you have any alcohol? We used to always get supplies when we were working, but ever since we started fighting the Iron蟲 (Iron Bugs), we haven't received any resupply.
1001402938.korean: 아, 사령관. 술 좀 없어? 예전에 일할땐&n술은 항상 지급됐었는데, 철충들과&n싸우게 된 후부턴 보급이&n안나오지 뭐야.

1001402939.english: Saying I'm beautiful over and over again—are you expecting me to blush? I'm sorry I couldn't live up to your expectations.
1001402939.korean: 아름답다고 몇 번씩이나 말하는 건,&n내가 얼굴이라도 붉히는 것을&n기대하는 건가? 기대에 부응하지&n못해서 미안하다.

1001402940.english: How's my dress? Hehe, I really like it… Commander, you're having weird thoughts again, aren't you? It shows on your face, you know?
1001402940.korean: 내 드레스 어때? 헤헷, 나는 엄청&n마음에 드… 사령관, 또 이상한 생각하고&n있지. 얼굴에 다 티나거든?

1001402941.english: You know I have all sorts of dreams, too. Is that... strange?

1001402942.english: No reason is needed for escorting. I only protect it because I was ordered to.
1001402942.korean: 호위에 이유는 필요하지 않습니다.&n명령받았기에 지킬 뿐입니다.

1001402943.english: If I were to lose you, Master… I don’t even want to imagine it. So please do not even think about doing anything dangerous. As long as I am here, absolutely not.
1001402943.korean: 만약 주인님을 잃게된다면… 상상하기도&n싫습니다. 그러니까 위험한 행동을&n하실 생각은 하지 마세요. 제가 있는 한,&n절대로 안됩니다.

1001402944.english: It's a slap in the face.

1001402945.english: Wait, just a moment. You can't come up yet...! Ah, well... that... Ah, I'm not quite ready yet...
1001402945.korean: 자, 잠깐만요. 아직 올라오시면&n안 돼요…! 아, 그게… 그…&n아, 아직 준비가 덜 됐어요...

1001402946.english: Ugh... my heart is pounding so hard I can't stay still...

1001402947.english: If you underestimate me just because I was originally a princess, you will get a taste of the thrill.
1001402947.korean: 이몸이 본디 공주였다고 얕봤다간&n짜릿한 맛을 보게 될 거다.

1001402948.english: I have prepared your bedding. I will attend to you, so please go to your bed.
1001402948.korean: 이부자리를 준비해두었사와요.&n소녀가 시중을 들테니, 어서 침소에&n드시어요.

1001402949.english: What? You're asking what I've been doing all this time? Well, obviously... Steel Line Online! Commander, would you like to join?
1001402949.korean: 네? 여태 뭘 하고 있었냐구요? 그야&n당연히... 스틸라인 온라인이죠!&n사령관님도 같이 하실래요?

1001402950.english: That promise to show me a wider variety of pleasures… You haven't forgotten, have you?
1001402950.korean: 내게 더 다양한 종류의 쾌락을&n알려주겠다던 그 약속…&n설마 잊진 않았겠지?

1001402951.english: If you keep sending me signals like that… I feel embarrassed… It’s not even time to sleep yet…
1001402951.korean: 자꾸 그렇게 신호를&n보내시면… 부끄러워요…&n아직 잘 시간도 아닌데…

1001402952.english: As long as the meat tastes good, it doesn't matter what kind it is, right? Isn't that right? In that sense... Hehehe... I'm not going to say.
1001402952.korean: 어떤 고기든 맛만 좋으면&n되는 거지? 안 그래? 그런&n면에서… 히히힛… 말&n안할래.

1001402953.english: My dream is to be the best warrior and the best wife. If I try hard enough, I will definitely be able to achieve both.
1001402953.korean: 제 꿈은 최고의 전사와&n최고의 아내예요.&n노력하면 분명 둘 다 이룰&n수 있을 거예요.

1001402954.english: Commander, I have a complaint. Cheering from the bedroom is too much... In that state... I'm embarrassed.
1001402954.korean: 사령관, 나 불만있어.&n침실에서 응원하는 건&n너무해... 그 상태론…&n부끄럽단 말야.

1001402955.english: I like the Commander. I will never change my mind.
1001402955.korean: 나 사령관이 좋아. 이&n마음은 절대로 안 변할 거야.

1001402956.english: It is a shame that it lacks a charge function. Charging is the most important thing for a knight's honor...
1001402956.korean: 돌격 기능이 없다는 것이&n아쉽습니다. 돌격이야말로 기사의&n명예에 가장 중요한 것인데…

1001402957.english: Yes, Savior. I was just about to offer a prayer for you.
1001402957.korean: 네, 구원자님. 마침 구원자님을&n위해 기도를 올리려던&n참이었습니다.

1001402958.english: Were you thinking about the upcoming battle? Well, that’s fine, but... just for today... won’t you stay with me?
1001402958.korean: 앞으로 있을 전투를 생각하고&n있었나? 뭐, 그것도 좋지만.&n오늘만큼은... 나와 같이 있어주지&n않겠나?

1001402959.english: Master, you are the first person to tell me you wanted to see my eyes... Most people only talk about my senses...
1001402959.korean: 주인님은 제게 눈빛을 보고&n싶다고 말씀하신…. 첫 번째&n분이세요. 대부분 제 감각에 대한&n이야기만 하는데…

1001402960.english: Sometimes… because of Your Majesty, my brain doesn’t function properly… It’s strange. Really…
1001402960.korean: 가끔씩은… 폐하 때문에 제 머리가&n제대로 작동하지 않습니다…&n이상해요. 정말…

1001402961.english: The Commander's confession deeply moved me. Now... I hope we can move on to the next touching moment.
1001402961.korean: 사령관의 고백은 충분히 날&n감동시켰다. 이젠... 다음 감동으로&n넘어갔으면 좋겠군.

1001402962.english: I know you care for me, but... please do not indulge too much in pleasure. I am afraid that I might become a bad woman.

1001402963.english: Lately… I’ve started to understand Lise-nee’s feelings a little bit. Oh my! Please don’t be so surprised.
1001402963.korean: 요즘은… 리제 언니의 마음이&n조금씩 이해가기 시작했어요.&n어머나! 너무 그렇게 놀라지 말아&n주세요.

1001402964.english: "Our Commander, can I give you a hug just once? It's just... I want to give you a hug..."
1001402964.korean: 우리 사령관, 한 번만 안아봐도 돼?&n그냥... 누나가 안아주고 싶은걸…

1001402965.english: I shouldn't give my husband a mirror. What if he sees me and stops liking me…
1001402965.korean: 남편한테 거울은 주면 안 돼. 날&n보고 싫어지면 어떡해…

1001402966.english: I'm not a night owl, but... I can keep watch over you while you sleep at night. I'm used to staying on alert all night.
1001402966.korean: 저는 야행성은 아니지만... 밤에 잠드신&n주인님 곁을 지켜드릴 수는 있어요.&n밤새 경계하는 건 익숙해요.

1001402967.english: Do you really want to hear an answer...? You... you'll keep it a secret from the leader, right? Th-then... Master is the most precious to me. And... I love you the most.

1001402968.english: I had a feeling I’d be having a drink with the Commander again… Ah, no! It’s not that I don’t want to… I mean… what I mean is… Ugh…

1001402969.english: Hmm... Swimsuits are meant to be worn for swimming, but everyone is interested in weird things.
1001402969.korean: 흐음… 수영복은 수영하려고 입는 건데,&n다들 이상한 곳에 관심이 많단 말이야.

1001402970.english: Huh? No! This is all just a joke…! So— Ugh, just stay still…! Hmph, why do you keep running away...
1001402970.korean: 어머? 아니야! 이거 전부 다 그냥&n장난이라구…! 그러니까- 윽, 가만히좀…!&n힝, 왜 자꾸 도망가는거야아...

1001402971.english: You think it's difficult? This is such an interesting novel... You ask what it's about? You really haven't read a single bit, have you? ...It's a love story... blooming amidst war.

1001402972.english: Hmm, well...? I feel like he is a child who needs care from anyone... and of course, the Commander too.

1001402973.english: The responsibility and pressure you feel, Commander... I, being so inadequate, probably cannot fully understand it. Still... please remember that I always believe in you. And that no matter what happens, I love you.

1001402974.english: The Kama Sutra isn't just erotic... ! It's a bit more... profound...
1001402974.korean: 카마수트라는 단순히 야한 게 아니에요…!&n그보단 좀 더… 심오한게...

1001402975.english: Captain Panther must have cut in line. Ugh, so frustrating. I need to get promoted soon too...
1001402975.korean: 분명히 팬서 대장이 새치기 한 걸거야.&n으으, 분해. 나도 어서 진급을 해야하는데...

1001402976.english: I gave up on the swimming competition. What could a grunt like us possibly do at swimming? Besides, and... as you can see, the resistance is high, so it's tough.
1001402976.korean: 수영대회는 포기했슴다. 저희같은 땅개가&n수영을 해봤자 뭘 얼마나 하겠슴까?&n뭐, 그리고… 보시는대로 저항이 커서&n힘들지 말임다.

1001402977.english: Here, I wrote down a list of things I want to do with you, Commander. You'll do them all with me, right? Then… I, let's start with holding hands…
1001402977.korean: 여기, 사령관님이랑 하고 싶은 일 리스트를&n적어왔어요. 전부 같이 해주실 거죠?&n그럼… 소, 손 잡기 부터...

1001402978.english: Kuhuhu, today is the day to... the Commander's genes... B-How cowardly of you to summon Miss Vanilla again! Ugh, when will my thirst finally be quenched...!

1001402979.english: I do not expect anything in return for my feelings. I am simply so happy to be able to tell you that I love you, Master, like this.
1001402979.korean: 제 마음에 보답을 바라지는 않습니다.&n이렇게 주인님께 사랑한다고 말할 수 있게&n된 것만으로도 너무 기쁘니까요.

1001402980.english: I didn't gain weight, my zipper is broken! Ugh, why isn't this working...!
1001402980.korean: 살 찐게 아니라 지퍼가 고장 난 거라구!&n으윽, 왜 이렇게 안 되는거야…!

1001402981.english: But why is it a cat? Commander, do you like cats? ...Meow?

1001402982.english: Th-this is a talisman that weakens magical powers while preparing for the ritual. ...Are you, are you convinced?
1001402982.korean: 이, 이건 의식을 준비하는 동안 매지컬 파워를&n약화시키는 부적이래요.&n...나, 납득하시는 거예요?

1001402983.english: Master? If you wish… may I show you around here a little?
1001402983.korean: 주인님? 주인님께서 원하신다면…&n제가 이곳을 조금 안내해&n드려도 될까요?

1001402984.english: Captain Leona is... truly amazing. If I work hard at everything, will I be able to become a cool woman like our Captain someday?
1001402984.korean: 레오나 대장님은... 정말 대단해요.&n저도 매사에 열심히 하면 언젠가 우리&n대장님처럼 멋진 여자가 될 수 있을까요?

1001402985.english: My sister... said she was worried because I'm negative about everything... Master? Master... what do you think of me like this?
1001402985.korean: 언니는… 제가 매사에 부정적이라&n걱정이 된다 했었죠… 주인님? 주인님께서는…&n이런 저를 어떻게 생각하시나요?

1001402986.english: All the grain I have gathered belongs to you, Master. So, even if the world were to end many more times, you would never go hungry.
1001402986.korean: 제가 모은 모든 곡물은 전부 주인님 거예요.&n그러니까, 세상이 몇 번을 더 멸망해도&n주인님이 배가 고플 일은 없을 거예요.

1001402987.english: Commander, I will cast a spell for you. A spell that will never... leave me... forever.
1001402987.korean: 사령관님, 제가 마법을 걸어 드릴게요.&n영원히... 절 떠나지 않는 마법을….

1001402988.english: Ugh... When you're with me... I wish you'd think of me rather than the Iron蟲. Gentleman.
1001402988.korean: 으… 나와 함께 있을 땐… 철충보단 날&n생각해 줬으면 좋겠다. 젠틀맨.

1001402989.english: I’m going to rehabilitate every single one of you who can’t follow even a basic rule. With pain so severe that you’d rather die.
1001402989.korean: 기본적인 규칙 하나도 못 지키는 녀석들은&n내가 전부 갱생시켜 주겠어. 차라리 죽는&n게 나을 정도의 고통으로.

1001402990.english: Well! So now I'm totally caught? So… what do you plan to do with me now? W-what?! What on earth is that in your hand, Commander? Are you serious?!
1001402990.korean: 자! 이제 내가 꼼짝없이 잡힌 꼴이 됐네?&n그래서… 이젠 날 어떻게 할 셈이지?&n으, 으응?! 사령관 손에 그건 대체 뭐야?&n지, 진심이야?!

1001402991.english: I have taken care of all your belongings, Master. So, please don't worry, Master, and just... S-Sorry. I did it unintentionally...
1001402991.korean: 주인님의 소지품은 제가 모두 챙겼습니다.&n그러니, 주인님은 걱정하지 마시고 안내나&n똑바로… 죄, 죄송합니다. 무심코 그만….

1001402992.english: This tight dress, which isn't even bulletproof, saved my life several times.
1001402992.korean: 방탄도 안되는 이 꽉 조이기만 하는 &n드레스가 제 목숨을 몇 번이나 구해&n줬었죠.

1001402993.english: Milk is packed with nutrients necessary for growth. I will give you some of my milk as well, Commander, so please drink plenty and grow to your heart's content.
1001402993.korean: 우유에는 성장에 필요한 영양소가 가득&n차 있답니다. 제 우유를 사령관님한테도&n드릴 테니 많이 드시고 마음껏 성장하세요.

1001402994.english: "Well Done" candy... What on earth is this... It's not that I dislike it, but...
1001402994.korean: ‘참 잘했어요’ 사탕이라니… 이건&n대체… 싫은 건, 아니지만…

1001402995.english: I climbed my way up here, stepping over countless failures. What do you think of me?
1001402995.korean: 난 수많은 실패작들을 밟고.&n여기까지 올라왔지.&n당신은 이런 날 어떻게 생각해?

1001402996.english: Yeah, I like listening to music. Here, earphones... It's my favorite song. They say Sleipnir sang it... Let's listen together.
1001402996.korean: 응, 노래 듣는 거 좋아해. 자,&n이어폰… 제일 좋아하는 노래야.&n슬레이프니르가 불렀대... 같이&n듣자.

1001402997.english: Hmm, I've definitely gotten softer now that I'm an adult. Do you want to touch me too, Oppa?

1001402998.english: Why, why do you keep asking only me… I, I just want Captain Khan and the Commander to get together…
1001402998.korean: 왜, 왜 자꾸 저한테만… 저, 저는 칸&n대장님이 사령관님이랑&n맺어졌으면 좋겠다구요…

1001402999.english: I will report on the contents of today's operations meeting. ... Commander, what do you think of me... Ah, nothing! Nothing...
1001402999.korean: 금일 작전 회의 내용을 보고&n하겠습니다. ... 사령관님께서는&n절 어떻게 생각하고… 아, 아무것도&n아닙니다! 아무것도…

1001403000.english: Get drunk on me instead of champagne. I think that’s enough, what do you think?
1001403000.korean: 샴페인 대신 제 모습에&n취해보세요. 충분하다고&n생각하는데, 당신 생각은?

1001403001.english: Please stop looking at it. Otherwise, you'll want to move straight to the next step of the meal.
1001403001.korean: 자꾸 보지 마세요. 그럼 식사 다음&n단계로 바로 넘어가고 싶어져요.

1001403002.english: Ugh... I'll show you the results of my training... You can stay still, Master...
1001403002.korean: 우으… 훈련의 성과를&n보여드릴게요… 주인님은&n가만히 계셔도 돼요…

1001403003.english: Um... Commander? I heard that in order to become a real family... there is something that absolutely must be done... Can you... do it for me?
1001403003.korean: 저… 사령관님? 진짜 가족이 되기&n위해선… 꼭 해야만 하는 일이&n있다고 들었는데… 해주실 수…&n있나요?

1001403004.english: Ugh... if you whisper in my ear like that...

1001403005.english: Don't worry. I will protect you, Master.
1001403005.korean: 걱정 마세요. 주인님은 제가&n지켜 드릴 테니까요.

1001403006.english: Hmm? … Did you get excited seeing me? Hehehe… How cute…
1001403006.korean: 으음? … 날 보고 흥분한 거야?&n후후후… 귀여워라…

1001403007.english: Just for today, I’m going to let you taste this much. Th-that’s it!
1001403007.korean: 오늘만 특별히 여기까지&n맛보게 해줄거야. 따, 딱&n여기까지야!

1001403008.english: Every time I talk to the Commander, the number of things I cannot understand keeps increasing... so it is a bit difficult.
1001403008.korean: 사령관님과 이야기할 때마다, 제가&n이해할 수 없는 것들이 점점&n늘어나서… 조금, 곤란합니다.

1001403009.english: It seems like Tomo and Draco are avoiding me lately… Was the story about the evolution of air combat doctrine not interesting?
1001403009.korean: 토모랑 드라코가 요즘 날 피하는&n것 같아… 항공 전투 교리의&n변천사에 대한 이야기가&n재미없었던 걸까?

1001403010.english: I see there are a lot of guys working out here too! It’s not quite sparring, but my body’s really heated up. Boss, let’s do it together!
1001403010.korean: 여기도 운동하는 애들이 많았구나!&n스파링까진 아니지만, 그래도 몸이&n딱 좋게 달아올랐어. 대장도 같이&n하자!

1001403011.english: I am happy every day because I can be with the former commander.
1001403011.korean: 전 사령관님과 같이 있을 수&n있어서 매일매일 행복해요.

1001403012.english: My eavesdropping is absolutely a secret from Captain Khan. Make sure it's not! ...Why, why are you laughing...?
1001403012.korean: 제가 엿듣는 거, 칸 대장님께는&n절대로 비밀이에요. 꼭이요! ...왜, &n왜 웃으세요...?

1001403013.english: I never imagined Master would like this kind of training.
1001403013.korean: 주인님이 이런 종류의 교육을&n좋아하실 줄이야. 정말 상상도&n못한 일이네요.

1001403014.english: Even the Commander knows my skills now, right? Th-that's why you keep trying to pat my head!
1001403014.korean: 사령관도 이젠 내 실력을 알았지?&n그, 그러니까 자꾸 머리&n쓰다듬으려고 하지 마!

1001403015.english: If there's anything you can't handle, just tell me. Whatever it is, I'll turn it into dust. Hehe.
1001403015.korean: 처치하기 곤란한 게 있으면 내게&n말만 해. 그게 뭐가 됐든 내가 아주&n가루로 만들어 줄 테니까. 후후.

1001403016.english: Being dressed like this... makes me crave something sweet. How about a cup of honey milk tea?
1001403016.korean: 이 차림으로 있으려니… 조금&n달콤한 게 생각나는군요. 허니&n밀크티 한 잔은 어떤가요?

1001403017.english: Your Majesty must not be influenced by such unruly people. I will stay by your side.
1001403017.korean: 폐하께선 저런 불량스러운&n분들에게 물드셔선 안 됩니다.&n제, 제가 옆에 붙어&n있겠습니다.

1001403018.english: Since Brownie did it for me, Commander, you shouldn't scold her too much... You're saying you'll praise her?... Why...?
1001403018.korean: 브라우니는 절 위해서 한&n일이니까, 사령관님도&n너무 혼 내진… &n...칭찬하신다구요?&n...어째서…?

1001403019.english: Shall I put one on you, Commander, too? Kyaa, so cute~ Then let's try something else!
1001403019.korean: 사령관님한테도 하나&n달아드릴까요? 꺄핫, 귀여워~&n그럼 다른 것도 한 번 해보죠!

1001403020.english: The reason my main armament is meager is that I trust the firepower of the troops under my command, just as you trust us.
1001403020.korean: 내 주무장이 빈약한 건, 내 지휘를&n따르는 부대원들의 화력을 믿기&n때문이다. 그대가 우리를 믿는&n것처럼.

1001403021.english: If only Tomo hadn't pressed the switch during that operation!... I, I'm sorry, Commander.
1001403021.korean: 그 작전 때 토모 양이 스위치를&n누르지만 않았어도!&n... 죄, 죄송해요 사령관님.

1001403022.english: It was cool so I felt a little better... but then I smelled Master's scent...

1001403023.english: ...I saw the Commander getting along well with the maids. I was wondering if I could become like that if I wore this... R-really?
1001403023.korean: ...사령관이 메이드 분들과&n친하게 지내시는 걸 봤어요. 이걸&n입으면 저도 그렇게 될 수&n있을까 해서… 지, 진짠가요?

1001403024.english: Among countless memories, the most precious are the ones with Your Excellency. Will you continue to create such memories for me in the future...?
1001403024.korean: 수많은 추억 중에서도 가장 소중한&n건 각하와의 추억입니다. 앞으로도&n저에게 그런 추억들을 만들어&n주시겠습니까...?

1001403025.english: Ta-da~ What I prepared today is Crepe & Sucre. Inside, there's strawberries, whipped cream, & mint chocolate... Why, why are you running away?!
1001403025.korean: 짠~ 오늘 준비한 건 크레프&n수크레야. 안에 딸기랑 생크림이랑&n민트 초코랑... 왜, 왜 도망가는&n거야?!

1001403026.english: I guess this is what a parent's heart is like. Even when the team members run wild, I get angry, but then quickly... Please keep this a secret from those kids.
1001403026.korean: 이게 부모의 마음이란 것일지도&n모르겠네요. 팀원들이 맘대로&n날뛰면 화가 났다가도, 금세…&n그 아이들에게는 비밀로 해주세요.

1001403027.english: I can't take my eyes off this~? Hehe, I would have been in big trouble if I had chosen a quiet one.
1001403027.korean: 이거 눈을 못 떼는 걸~? 후후,&n얌전한 걸로 골랐으면 큰일날&n뻔했어.

1001403028.english: Right. If you think of this as the official uniform... Eek?! T-Don't pull my tail!
1001403028.korean: 그래. 이것도 공식 유니폼이라고&n생각하면… 으햣?! 꼬, 꼬리&n잡아당기지 마!

1001403029.english: There are so many cute ones besides Tiger. This one is an aye-aye monkey, but... isn't it really not cute...?
1001403029.korean: 타이거 말고도 귀여운 아이들이&n엄청 많아요. 이 아이는 아이아이&n원숭이인데, 엄청…&n별로 안귀여우세요…?

1001403030.english: I am not intoxicated. However… I wanted to gain even a little bit of the courage to reveal my true feelings to my master…
1001403030.korean: 취하지는 않았사옵니다. 다만…&n주인께 속내를 드러낼 용기를&n조금이나마 얻고 싶었기에…

1001403031.english: Yes. As you said, keeping my eyes open is a bit painful. Still, I want to take in your image, Master, even if just a little...
1001403031.korean: 네. 말씀대로 눈을 뜨고 있는 것은&n조금 고통스럽습니다. 그래도&n조금이나마 주인님의 모습을 눈에&n담고 싶어서...

1001403032.english: Eek…?! Th-that’s true. Touching it is the best way to check how sturdy and flexible it is. ...But, aren’t you touching it a bit too much…?
1001403032.korean: 꺅…?! 그, 그렇네요. 얼마나&n튼튼하고 유연한지 확인해보려면&n만져보는게 제일이니까요.&n...그, 그래도 너무 만지는 거&n아니에요…?

1001403033.english: So, by your side, Commander, I don't need to be a Vice-Captain, just a Sirene...? Yes. Thank you for saying that.
1001403033.korean: 사령관님 곁에서는 부함장이 아니라&n그냥 세이렌이면 되는 건가요…?&n네. 그렇게 말씀해주셔서 감사해요.

1001403034.english: Even if it is in front of a human male, this... this outfit meant to seduce the opposite sex is embarrassing.
1001403034.korean: 아무리 인간 남성의 앞이라고 해도&n이런… 이, 이성을 유혹하기 위한&n복장은 부끄럽군요.

1001403035.english: It seems Miss Armand was really cornered, considering she went so far as to ask me for help. But what to do about this... Judging by His Majesty's reaction, it seems to be backfiring...
1001403035.korean: 저한테 도움을 요청할 정도니 아르망&n양도 몰리긴 했나봐요. 그런데 이걸&n어쩌나… 폐하의 반응을 보니&n역효과인것 같은데...

1001403036.english: I'm inspecting the flight equipment separately, too. Hehe, I guess we'll have to postpone flying together? Well, I'm fine on the ground, though...
1001403036.korean: 비행 장비도 따로 점검중이야.&n헤헷, 같이 나는 건 미뤄야겠네?&n뭐, 나는 땅에서도 괜찮긴 한데...

1001403037.english: I was reading a book I borrowed from the Captain. They say it's a novel about human romance... Huh? Ah, the Captain says he received it from Harpyia.
1001403037.korean: 대장님에게 빌려온 책을 읽어보고&n있었습니다. 인간님들의 연애에&n관한 소설이라고 하는데… 네? 아,&n 대장님은 하르페이아 씨에게&n받았다고 합니다.

1001403038.english: Don't worry. Even if the event is held now, it is for you, Commander.
1001403038.korean: 걱정 마세요. 지금 행사가 열린다&n해도 사령관 님을 위한 행사니까요.

1001403039.english: As long as I am here, no external enemy will be able to set foot in our territory.
1001403039.korean: 내가 있는 한, 그 어떤 외적도 우리의 영역에 발을 들이지 못할 것이다.

1001403040.english: They say the reason I was chosen is because our names are similar. Though our personalities are polar opposites. Well, do we look good together...?
1001403040.korean: 제가 선택된 이유는 이름이 비슷해서&n라고 합니다. 성격은 정 반대지만요.&n자, 잘 어울리나요…?

1001403041.english: Hahaha, look at that Undine trembling! Meow~ Ah, here she comes running! I should hide behind the Commander~
1001403041.korean: 꺄하핫, 저기 운디네 부들거리는&n것 좀 봐요! 메-롱~ 아, 뛰어온다!&n사령관 뒤에 숨어있어야지~

1001403042.english: We still have Orca. No matter how difficult it is, we will be able to win someday.
1001403042.korean: 우리에겐 오르카가 남아 있다오.&n아무리 어려워도 언젠간 승리할 수&n있을 거요.

1001403043.english: Yeah, pretty…? Hmph. Of course— W-wait a minute. ...Thank you. Commander...
1001403043.korean: 예, 예뻐…?&n흥. 그거야 당연- 자, 잠깐만.&n...고마, 워. 사령관...

1001403044.english: I'm just getting into the mood right now, but someday, really with the Commander... Oh, I-I'm sorry. I got carried away without realizing it.
1001403044.korean: 지금은 기분만 내는 거지만,&n언젠가 사령관님과 진짜로…&n어머, 죄, 죄송합니다.&n저도 모르게 들떠버렸습니다.

1001403045.english: I was right to make a hole. Stupid pests… Hehe, Master… I will engrave myself deep into your mind…
1001403045.korean: 역시 구멍을 내는 게 옳았어.&n바보같은 해충들… 후후, 주인님…&n뇌리 깊숙히 저를 새겨드릴게요...

1001403046.english: The black one was fine since she just grumbled, but the white one is pitch black on the inside, just... ugh... Oh, Commander, do you agree?
1001403046.korean: 까만 애는 떽떽거리기나 해서 괜찮았는데&n하얀 애는 속이 시커먼게 아주, 어휴…&n오, 사령관도 공감하나봐?

1001403047.english: I'm ready, so we can hold the wedding once you're ready. As you know well, I don't really like keeping people on edge.

1001403115.english: I was foolish and have fastened the first button incorrectly, but would you be able to understand even now...? My deep affection for you, my master...

1001403116.english: Haa, haa… If you go that slowly, dawn will break. Your humble servant, I will prepare myself, so… in one go…
1001403116.korean: 하아, 하아… 그리 천천히 하시면&n날이 새어버립니다. 소첩, 마음의&n준비를 할테니, 단번에…

1001403117.english: I've been called a "positive fool" by others... Ugh, even for me... Commander, do you perhaps think so too?
1001403117.korean: 긍정 바보라고… 다른 분들에게&n그런 말을 들었어요…&n으, 이건 아무리 저라도…&n사령관도 혹시 그렇게 생각해요?

1001403118.english: Yes, you mean I'm pretty? Uh... um, Commander, you look especially handsome today... so, I can't take my eyes off you.
1001403118.korean: 예, 예쁘다구요? 으…&n저기, 사령관님도 오늘 특히&n멋지셔서… 저, 눈을 못떼겠어요.

1001403119.english: ...Well, come to think of it, this is simply an act of chasing desire. Fulfilling one's duties is nothing to be ashamed of, but this is a bit...
1001403119.korean: ...새, 생각해보니 이것은 단순히&n욕망을 좇는 행위로군요. 의무를&n다하는 것은 부끄럽지 않지만 이건&n조금...

1001403120.english: What does the form matter? As long as the sentiment is conveyed, that is all that matters. May God bless my Majesty.
1001403120.korean: 형식이 뭐가 중요하겠어요? 마음만&n전해지면 되는거죠.&n나의 폐하께 신의 가호를.

1001403121.english: You know our summer combat uniforms each have a slightly different design, right? M-how about mine?
1001403121.korean: 우리 하계 전투복은 각자&n디자인이 조금씩 다른 거 알지?&n내, 내 건 어때?

1001403122.english: I have knowledge about relationships between men and women. However, I am not sure what kind of satisfaction it provides...
1001403122.korean: 남녀 관계에 관한 지식은 있습니다.&n다만, 그것이 어떠한 만족감을&n주는지는… 잘 모르겠습니다.

1001403123.english: How about you, Commander? Um, by any chance, should I go on a diet?

1001403124.english: I often worked alone, so... it was fun doing something with others. Magic Gen- S-Commander, too, later, definitely...
1001403124.korean: 저는 혼자 일하는 경우가&n많았어서… 다른 분들과 함께&n무언가를 하는 것이 즐거웠습니다.&n매직 젠- 사, 사령관님도&n나중에, 꼭...

1001403125.english: Hehe, Commander~ How shall I play with you today- Ow! Eek, I'm not a kid, so don't hit me on the head!
1001403125.korean: 히힛, 사령과안~ 오늘은 또 어떻게&n놀아 드릴- 아얏! 이익, 저는 애가&n아니니까 꿀밤 같은 거&n때리지 마세요!

1001403126.english: Invincible... Please stop using such an embarrassing nickname!
1001403126.korean: 무, 무적이라니… 그런 부끄러운&n별명은 그만둬 주시오!

1001403127.english: P-Commander. Hey... don't just stand there watching, do something quickly...
1001403127.korean: 사, 사령관. 저기…&n그렇게 보고만 있지 말고&n빨리 뭐라도 해보란 말야...

1001403128.english: Please don't tease me. We are not actually mother and daughter. My children would also want the Commander to be their husband, not their father.
1001403128.korean: 놀리지 마세요. 진짜 모녀 관계는&n아닙니다. 저희 아이들도&n사령관님이 아버지가 아니라…&n신랑… 이 되어주기를 바랄 거예요.

1001403129.english: This isn't enough anymore... Master, please hold me tight. Tight enough to break me...
1001403129.korean: 이제 이런 걸로는 부족해…&n주인님, 저를 꽉 안아주세요.&n제가 부서져버릴 정도로...

1001403130.english: You want to drink together? Ah... haha... I do like alcohol, but I have a low tolerance... so, I'll just drink by myself.

1001403131.english: Even if you don't blush like a young girl, you know it well, don't you? Because you are the one who taught me the joy of being loved.

1001403132.english: Again, again! Ugh, really... do you really have to be like this even at a time like this? For now, let's just... hold each other tight. Be a good girl, okay?

1001403133.english: I feel like I've become a girl full of dreams. Master, can you… make my dream come true?
1001403133.korean: 꿈많은 소녀가 되어버린 것 같아요.&n주인님, 제 꿈… 이뤄주실 수 있나요?

1001403134.english: ...Whenever I am by my Master's side, I constantly feel a strange sensation. It is a feeling that I could do anything for my Master, even without being ordered to do so.

1001403135.english: W-would you like to lie down together? It's super soft. We have to press right against each other, but... I think that would be better...

1001403136.english: I do want to run out right now. But still, today I want to stay in your arms like this, Commander!
1001403136.korean: 당장이라도 뛰쳐나가고 싶긴 해요.&n그래도 오늘은 이렇게 사령관님한테&n안겨있을래요!

1001403137.english: After losing my mother at a young age, I lived in a small room, hoping that someday a prince would come to rescue me. It was my older sister who saved me back then, but... only now...

1001403138.english: Ugh... My body is a bit stiff from playing games all day. Commander, please massage this spot for me. Please?

1001403139.english: Hehe... Looks like you still have a lot to teach me? Fine, teach me more. Anything at all...

1001403140.english: I finally realize it. My place of rest… was here, in the embrace of the Savior…

1001403141.english: On days without battle, I want to make love with you all day long… Surely… you don’t think you can escape from me, do you?

1001403143.english: Hey... can you please forget about when we were totally drunk together, Commander...? Th-that's because it's embarrassing...! Th-it's because it's embarrassing...

1001403144.english: Neri's swimsuit is a competition swimsuit. I'm saying you can't beat Neri wearing a swimsuit that comes off so easily!

1001403145.english: Aww! Can't you just pretend you don't know and let me catch you this once? Ha, just this once~

1001403146.english: Love is bound to blossom even in the midst of war. And if you are on vacation at a travel destination... wouldn't it be even more so?

1001403147.english: Oh my, look at the time... Come here~ I'll hold you tight until you fall asleep in my arms again tonight~?

1001403148.english: Since the Commander is so popular, aren't you not satisfied with just the ordinary anymore...? I, I prepared a lot of new things...

1001403149.english: Commander~ Promote me. Huh? Then I'll be happy— I guess this kind of thing just doesn't suit me. ...But behind the scenes, I was sincere.

1001403150.english: It might feel a bit like cheating, but so what? The Commander seems to be enjoying it too, so it doesn't matter. ...You mean me? This is the best time of my life.

1001403151.english: Um… actually, there are a few more things on this list… Th-that… well, I guess you could say that when I sit, I want to lie down, and when I lie down, I want to sleep… you know… *Squeal*?! … Success in getting into the Commander’s arms.

1001403153.english: Seeing you just stare at me like that, I see you have no intention of fixing it...? I don't know anymore. I guess I'll just stay like this.

1001403154.english: I don't know what the point is of mimicking a cat's behavior, but... you mean putting your paw next to your ear? ...Meow?

1001403155.english: Um... it feels a bit ticklish and hot... N-ho, by any chance, does the talisman actually work...?

1001403156.english: Master? Today… wouldn’t you like to spend some special time with me? For example…

1001403157.english: Um… Commander? If… I grow up… huh? Oh, no! I was just talking to myself, so… you don’t need to… worry about it.

1001403158.english: Master, I am always grateful that you took me in like this. Is there anything I can do for you? Yes! Anything at all.

1001403159.english: To be honest, eliminating terrorists is just a pretext. In reality, I just enjoy watching their agonizing struggles.

1001403160.english: Yes, I will follow. ... Of course, I will carry your heavy belongings, Master. Even someone this small in stature.

1001403161.english: Your Excellency, Commander? … In the world you will create… will I really be needed? Sometimes I find myself thinking that…

1001403162.english: Doesn't seeing dairy cows remind you of a relaxed country life, a rural lifestyle? If I could live a rural life with you, Commander, I... I could lick the wounds in your heart...

1001403163.english: If another human had been my commander... I don't even want to imagine it. I'm really glad that the last human is the commander.

1001403164.english: After meeting you… my thoughts have changed a little. The only one who can satisfy me… is you, after all.

1001403165.english: You taught me a lot, senior... so I think I know what this feeling is... I'm not going to tell you... senior.

1001403166.english: Now that I'm an adult, I'm going to do whatever I want. You like that, right?

1001403167.english: Hahaha, hahahaha… Haa, Commander… If you do that… Aww, I don’t know… Hwaat?! W-how far did you hear…?

1001403168.english: Wherever that may be… I am ready to follow you, Commander…

1001403169.english: You can't take your eyes off it. No, stay exactly as you are. Hehe, why do you think I made a dress out of this material? Feel free to admire it to your heart's content.

1001403170.english: I understand how you feel, Master. But... something else is more urgent for you than cooking, isn't it?

1001403172.english: S-A shower? In that case… since I’m family too! Could I… come in with you…? What? Is that… not allowed?

1001403173.english: It seems I’ve gotten used to your touch by now. Still, just to test it out… could you give me a hug once..? Ah…

1001403175.english: Ah... never mind the thanks, just go ahead and do whatever you want... go ahead...

1001403177.english: I think I made the right decision to get the upgrade. Because now I can touch the Commander's cheek and hold his hand like this.

1001403178.english: We're reading a book together again today, right? When it's time to turn the page, give me a signal like usual...

1001403179.english: Big Boss~ You're going to play together again today, right? I got tired first last time, but this time it's different! Let's hurry to the boss's room!

1001403180.english: Oh, today... I don't want to miss out on the Commander.

1001403186.english: Why, why are you suddenly hugging me… Ah… ... Then, just a moment… Shall I let go?… Mmm, Your Majesty… Hehe…
1001403186.korean: 왜, 왜 갑자기 끌어안으시는…&n아…... 그럼 잠깐만…&n풀어지도록, 할까요.&n...으음, 폐하… 후후…

1001403187.english: If you keep saying I'm pretty, I… I might end up believing it… Is that okay…?

1001403188.english: I need to fill Linty with cuteness before it's too late. You know what I need to do, right?... Please call Linty's name.

1001403190.english: Commander? Could you please keep what happened with you a secret from the troops? I'm begging you...

1001403191.english: Master… how much longer do I have to sit like this…? I’ll be obedient from now on, hmph… hurry…

1001403194.english: Eek?! What are you doing...? ... You say it feels good because of the sweet scent... D-Don't get so close...

1001403195.english: Can't you wait until I get off work? Please know that you aren't the only one getting anxious, Commander.

1001403197.english: You like this kind of thing, don't you? Look at it to your heart's content. ...But don't get distracted, okay? Got it?

1001403198.english: I feel protected when I'm in your arms, Commander. This is the first time I've been able to let my guard down this much... Please hold me tighter.
1001403198.korean: 사령관님한테 안겨있으면&n보호받는 것 같아요. 이렇게&n마음을 푹 놓고 있을 수 있는 건&n처음이야… 더 꼭 안아주세요.

1001403199.english: Hahaha, if I had known this would happen, I would have asked sooner... I am glad to finally realize that the Master answers sincerely to one's honest feelings.

1001403200.english: The scent, the sound, the colors, and… even the touch. Everything is filled with you, Master. Can you… fill even the last one…?

1001403201.english: I'm just positive, that doesn't mean I'm okay with everything... but I end up acting that way toward the Commander. I wonder why...

1001403202.english: When peace comes… I want to live in a place like this. Just the two of us, Commander. Please make sure to remember this as well.

1001403203.english: Duty… Lately, this word feels strange to me. My heart isn't like a duty… Human male. Can you understand my true feelings?

1001403204.english: Lord Azazel was plotting something as well, wasn't she? Heh heh, duty... I have no interest in such things. I simply love Your Majesty.

1001403205.english: I-I'm not trying to seduce you, okay? It's just... it's easier to wipe like this... Hehe, is that all? The Commander's deduction was right. Since I've been found out... You know what I want, right...?

1001403206.english: I understand that you, Commander, frequently share 'love' with others. If it does not offend you... could you let me know as well?

1001403213.english: Master. Please... please... color me... Lise... with your presence...

1001403222.english: These days, just going around the pagoda isn't enough... there are times when it doesn't quite satisfy me... Hehe...

1001403225.english: The fruit of love! That's too much!… Ah, no… Maybe now is the perfect time…

1001403228.english: Neri is going to eat... If you keep teasing me- Ack?! Targeting Neri when she's weak, that's unfair...

1001403229.english: The water play is all over now… So, shall we start another game? You ask what that is?… Th-there’s something! Hurry… come here.

1001403231.english: I guarantee it. What you are doing is the right thing, Commander. Even if it isn't, I will make it so. So… you just need to stay exactly as you are now, Commander.

1001403439.korean: ...제대로 반응해드리지 못하는 점,&n부디 이해해주시길 바랍니다. 아직은...

1001403440.english: Commander's touch is comforting… &n and makes me feel safe. Could you… &n do a little more?
1001403440.korean: 사령관님 손길은 기분 좋고… 안심돼요.&n조금만 더… 해주시겠어요…?

1001403441.english: Heheh, it's soft and squishy, &n it feels nice, doesn't it? &n Then I'll do it too. Take this!
1001403441.korean: 에헤헷, 말랑말랑해서&n기분 좋으신거죠?&n그럼 저도 할래요. 에잇!

1001403442.english: Haah… T-This is the first time I've &n received such affection… Ah… &n Will it end like this...?
1001403442.korean: 하읏… 이, 이런 애정을 받는 것은&n처음인지라… 앗…&n이대로 끝내시는지, 요...

1001403443.english: Ugh… Umm… Topdora, please look &n somewhere else for a second...
1001403443.korean: 으, 으응… 탑돌아, 잠깐만 딴 데&n보고 있어...

1001403444.english: Ugh… At this rate, your desires might &n swallow me whole…? Well, fine. &n Keep going, you…
1001403444.korean: 읏… 이러다간 당신의 욕망에 내가&n잡아먹힐지도 모르겠네…? 뭐, 좋아.&n계속해줘, 당신...

1001403445.english: Yes… if it is the Savior's will, &n I shall simply obey…
1001403445.korean: 네… 구원자님의 뜻이&n그러하다면… 저는 그저 따를&n뿐이죠…

1001403446.english: Seems like today… you want &n to take the lead…

1001403447.english: Ugh… P-Please don't focus &n on just one spot so intensely…
1001403447.korean: 읏… 그, 그렇게 한 곳만&n집요하게 하지 말아 주세요...

1001403448.english: W-Wait a sec… Let me just move this… &n Are you that impatient? &n Okay, all done. Come here.
1001403448.korean: 자, 잠깐마안… 이것만 좀 치우고…&n그렇게 급한 거야?&n자, 다 됐어. 이리 와.

1001403449.english: Oh, are you drying my swimsuit? Hmm… &n That doesn't seem like it? &n Commander, what are you really up to—hey?!
1001403449.korean: 아, 수영복 말려주는 거야? 흐음…&n그건 아닌 것 같은데에?&n사령관, 속셈이 뭐야-아?

1001403450.english: Hngh… It really feels like I might burst, &n but… I-I'm okay. Please continue.
1001403450.korean: 흐읏… 저, 정말 터질 것 같은&n기분이지만… 괘, 괜찮아. 계속해줘.

1001403451.english: Kyaa…?! N-No. It's just… it's a little &n different from what I studied. &n ...I want to get better… Please teach me, Commander.
1001403451.korean: 꺅…?! 아, 아냐. 그냥… 공부했던 거랑&n조금 달라서. ...나, 더 능숙해지고&n싶으니까… 사령관이 알려줘.

1001403452.english: Haah…! I-I'm the one who should &n be taking care of you… &n Please don't do that…
1001403452.korean: 하읏…! 보, 보살펴드려야 하는 건&n저인데… 이러시면, 안 돼요…

1001403453.english: So it's starting now…? &n I've warmed up so I can handle &n any movement…
1001403453.korean: 이제 시작하는 건가요…?&n어떤 동작도 소화할 수 있도록&n몸을 풀어뒀으니까…

1001403454.english: T-This is thinner than a swimsuit so I &n can feel your hands directly… So… &n please be a little more gentle...
1001403454.korean: 이, 이건 수영복보다 얇아서 손길이&n그대로 느껴진단말야… 그러니까…&n조금만 더 조심스럽게...

1001403455.english: Ugh… This is really becoming a habit &n for me. Will you take responsibility? Then… &n it's okay if you do more.
1001403455.korean: 읏… 이거, 진짜 버릇되어 버리지 말입니다.&n책임져 주시는검까? 그럼…&n얼마든지 더 하셔도 괜찮지 말임다.

1001403456.english: I-I've never been on a date, held hands, or hugged anyone &n before Commander… &n So please, take it slow…
1001403456.korean: 저, 저는 데이트도, 손 잡는 것도, 안기는 것도&n사령관님이 다 처음이니까…&n조금만 천천히 부탁드려요...

1001403457.english: Haa… You don't need to watch my reactions anymore &n Just listening… you'll understand.
1001403457.korean: 하읏… 이제는 제 반응을 살피시지 않아도&n됩니다. 듣기만 해도… 아실테니까요.

1001403458.english: You don't need the excuse of fixing it anymore… &n Wanna raise it a little higher?
1001403458.korean: 이제 고쳐준다고 핑계 안 대도 괜찮은데…&n좀 더, 올려볼래?

1001403459.english: Ugh… Nya, nyaang… Meow… &n C-Commander… just a moment...
1001403459.korean: 읏… 냐, 냐앙… 냥…&n사, 사령관님… 잠깐, 만...

1001403460.english: I-Is it finally time…? &n You'll undo the other seals too, right…?
1001403460.korean: 드, 드디어 때가 됐나요…?&n다른 봉인도 풀어주시는 거죠…?

1001403461.english: Hmm… Maybe we should move somewhere quieter… &n What do you think?
1001403461.korean: 으음… 조금 조용한 자리로 옮기는게&n나을 것 같은데… 어떻게 하시겠어요?

1001403462.english: Yes, Master… My body and heart both belong to you, &n so please… do as you wish…
1001403462.korean: 네 주인님… 제 몸과 마음은 모두 주인님의&n것이니… 주인님 마음대로 해 주세요….

1001403463.english: Hmm... This is... against the rules, isn't it? Outlaw?

1001403464.english: Ugh! … Pretty bold for a first date. &n If it's the usual Master… I guess &n that's kind of reassuring…
1001403464.korean: 읏! … 첫 데이트부터 과감하시군요.&n평소대로의 주인님이라… 되려&n안심이 된다고 해야 할까….

1001403465.english: Let's not do this here—could you tell me your room number? &n ...Once the party ends… &n I'll come to you…
1001403465.korean: 여기서 이러지 말고, 방 번호를 불러&n주시겠어요? ... 파티가 끝나면…&n제가 찾아갈 테니….

1001403466.english: Ahh... C-Commander...? How to make &n delicious banana milk... I think I finally… &n figured it out…
1001403466.korean: 아앗... 사, 사령관... 님? 맛있는&n바나나 우유를 만드는 방법... 이제…&n알 것 같아요….

1001403467.english: Well, since having a child right now is difficult... how about we raise a puppy together?
1001403467.korean: 지, 지금 당장 아이는 어려우니... 함께&n강아지라도 키우면... 어떨까요?

1001403468.english: Don't worry. Commander, I will protect my partner... Commander, even if it costs me my life.
1001403468.korean: 걱정 마세요. 사령관, 제 목숨을 바쳐서라도&n제 짝... 사령관을 지킬 테니.

1001403469.english: Actually, I don't like assassinations, but... if the Commander wants it, anyone...
1001403469.korean: 사실 암살은 좋아하지 않지만... 사령관이&n원하신다면 누구라도…

1001403470.english: You tricked me last time... You said this was just light physical contact between friends... Really... I guess I have no choice.
1001403470.korean: 저번에 날 속였죠... 이건 친구끼리 가벼운&n스킨쉽이라고 했으면서... 정말... 하는 수&n없네요.

1001403471.english: Sumi, Re...? An unfamiliar name. ...But now that I hear it... it hurts here.
1001403471.korean: 스미, 레…? 모르는 이름. ...그런데&n들으니까... 여기가, 아파.

1001403472.english: Me, a blank slate…? ...Kaen, I don't know anything about that. All I know is orders, missions, and death. Yeah. That’s all.
1001403472.korean: 내가, 백지…? ...카엔, 그런거 몰라.&n아는 건, 명령, 임무, 죽음. 응. 그게, 전부.
